name: Dr Neil Shah
subject: Winning the war on Tyranny
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Dr
body:
| [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=winning_the_war_on_tyranny&n=1) Peter, Last weekend, we all spent the day remembering the attack on our country that killed thousands of Americans. I will never forget that day. While ordinary Americans united to help each other, the career politicians united to steal our freedoms. And that still exists to this day. Our elected leaders waged costly wars, destroyed our freedoms in the name of security and expanded the size and scope of government well beyond what the Founders envisioned. **Now Joe Biden has declared that private sector businesses are no longer free to make their own choices. Even more disturbingly, Biden has infringed on the health freedoms of 80 million Americans. The Constitution grants the President no such powers.** All of these infringements are the result of career politicians - not terrorists! Following the 9-11 attacks, we were told by career politicians that we needed more “security”, which they traded out our liberties to achieve. Today, we are told we need government’s “protection” from COVID, and our freedoms are once again traded in. _“Those who would give up essential liberty, to purchase a little temporary safety, deserve neither liberty nor safety." - Benjamin Franklin_ I refuse to let America and Minnesota fail. My parents were immigrants to this country and built the American dream for themselves and their family. America is the best country on this planet because we are free. But we’re on the cusp of losing it all. You deserve someone who is willing to stand up to the political class and fight for your health freedoms. I’m not a career politician like my opponents, so I don’t do things the same way that they do things. We ended up in the position we’re in because of chronic compromise to Democrats and growing government at every opportunity. **Help me beat the career politicians and Fire Walz with a donation today.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=winning_the_war_on_tyranny&n=2 "Donate Today") [Donate Today](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=winning_the_war_on_tyranny&n=2)
---

As Governor, I will be a solutions-oriented guy, always looking for ways to defend your freedom. There’s actually a way to fight back against the Biden Administration and Tim Walz right now. We have the opportunity to stop vaccine mandates if we Republicans unify around Rep Erik Mortensen’s Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment and force a vote in the upcoming Special Session.
**Let’s show the Democrats in this state that there is hell to pay if they don’t get on board with health freedom. We MUST take the fight to them!**
Now is the time to roll up our sleeves and Save Minnesota.
As your next Governor, I’ll never let things get to this point. I will always use the office to protect your freedom from unconstitutional, federal mandates.
I will work with legislators who are willing to solve these problems and will expose those who care only about their election certificates. Some house cleaning will be needed.
[**Please help me Save Minnesota by beating the career politicians with a contribution today. I’m not funded by lobbyists and special interests like my opponents, so a donation of $25, $50 or even $100 goes along way to helping us #SaveSota.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=winning_the_war_on_tyranny&n=3)

**Thank you!**
****
Sincerely,
Dr. Neil Shah
Conservative Candidate for Governor
[http://www.electneil.com/](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=winning_the_war_on_tyranny&n=4)
Prepared and paid for by the Dr. Neil Shah for Governor Committee, 855 Village Center Dr #245, North Oaks, MN 55127
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=winning_the_war_on_tyranny&n=5). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=winning_the_war_on_tyranny&n=6), software for leaders.

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: The RNC is watching me.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
For the second year in a row, my congressional race is expected to be one of the closest in the nation I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f69a7afc9e5f40ef831159d85e11345d&_e=akJYptT8k576kEdST8009R0vYYedd4pZe00MBCmDYabx6G-v20M9Ps_buvhVaLPrU-fh-g-8BlVQLmBEcI8Vzy5u9U2CCz82bEsAJ-IJcZYVK56cnfCb03D2l_oKHbrVEhNFJlZEL4nX_0GQz5xO3e9LmTUOt9Z1na0j9G7eUV9MyJP9oyS1GVdoolxgqRO5Maop4UuLBWVfhBJYoVOM8k3UWnJEr2bV6IvRwFs2Vz0UtYa2g1bIbNVFVuwxZuCW3kvSILTjZoI3M8xLtKqF0fT14hzS6QGvjHWIKMAdMiic2le0f2R480uRPzzsUfc6mDvNm8frG-fF4zNVPg-MpfTwvMH4qWSHLIvhkYmMBgDoydgev_GrYqJ7yodBun1iDuQegKkb2UPOduAztl4FWt_VikUEZD9CF07y6BC_fJqnQyM1KIefHo-5R73BhY-JcVSQr6RrpBbGdu6Nv5zzFlJuQJ_t1JR5wjnvDZ96uu0%3D)

Peter,

Have you heard of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s “**Young Gun’s Program?** ” I hadn’t either until my first campaign for Congress last year.

I’d like to give you an explanation as to what the purpose of the program is and **[why I need your financial assistance to gain acceptance.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f69a7afc9e5f40ef831159d85e11345d&_e=akJYptT8k576kEdST8009R0vYYedd4pZe00MBCmDYabx6G-v20M9Ps_buvhVaLPrU-fh-g-8BlVQLmBEcI8Vzy5u9U2CCz82bEsAJ-IJcZYVK56cnfCb03D2l_oKHbrVEhNFJlZEL4nX_0GQz5xO3e9LmTUOt9Z1na0j9G7eUV9MyJP9oyS1GVdoolxgqRO5Maop4UuLBWVfhBJYoVOM8k3UWnJEr2bV6IvRwFs2Vz0UtYa2g1bIbNVFVuwxZuCW3kvSILTjZoI3M8xLtKqF0Rm7PXPL1jHTbQb3CyL4zerzygw_Ykt2nPUMSgVHSKyyV7GJHQfB4FciM37VRHfjLjoNrw-01AFanbL0y5RRRCTCW8dqKDOVEJgRKezEFfNORpE5k6QWAl-vdMxCAau7cNXM1Ny8riXwMg6Ovbu5TwMjh3a085NdMpTkpUFpzqwcVMxCs844FI-MPrWJ9ToD5A3lrk94b1vYSq_BFrOL-Ew%3D) **

The Young Guns program serves to help Republican candidates running in some of the most competitive districts around the country with a playbook on how to vanquish Democrat opposition, along with providing strategic support on everything from polling, fundraising, advertising and grassroots outreach. **Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C.** – and prove they can WIN.

**[If you’re a frequent flyer, you might equate it to elite-level status. Only the entrance fee for this program isn’t flying hundreds of thousands of miles per year, it’s raising $250,000 in one fundraising quarter.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f69a7afc9e5f40ef831159d85e11345d&_e=akJYptT8k576kEdST8009R0vYYedd4pZe00MBCmDYabx6G-v20M9Ps_buvhVaLPrU-fh-g-8BlVQLmBEcI8Vzy5u9U2CCz82bEsAJ-IJcZYVK56cnfCb03D2l_oKHbrVEhNFJlZEL4nX_0GQz5xO3e9LmTUOt9Z1na0j9G7eUV9MyJP9oyS1GVdoolxgqRO5Maop4UuLBWVfhBJYoVOM8k3UWnJEr2bV6IvRwFs2Vz0UtYa2g1bIbNVFVuwxZuCW3kvSILTjZoI3M8xLtKqF0Z0VbqykvSjP73Pidpb-XMbvGvRajCQyi4KsR1HIlhdLutfwrx3HnMWgb1Ot1IjotyqtOxzcreKk2WIJC_jW4tVtoJ1rLbwQ8OJhhRynuUsfDYGyQfp2H-3tU_F4ivWZsyGTf50fEklUjj8O_v7YEXrzEoFIczA1kJjs2MGChgT_QYdTqaOPG2mnG4dlmVL2lkVu9xhJYYyTUHY9DPLeiVI%3D)**

This year, I’m aiming to be one of the first candidates to qualify for the program because with my race expected to be one of the closest in the nation for a second year in a row, **[I sincerely need all of the help I can get. But, with the deadline arriving fast at the end of this month my campaign is still short of hitting the threshold for entry by $74,920](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f69a7afc9e5f40ef831159d85e11345d&_e=akJYptT8k576kEdST8009R0vYYedd4pZe00MBCmDYabx6G-v20M9Ps_buvhVaLPrU-fh-g-8BlVQLmBEcI8Vzy5u9U2CCz82bEsAJ-IJcZYVK56cnfCb03D2l_oKHbrVEhNFJlZEL4nX_0GQz5xO3e9LmTUOt9Z1na0j9G7eUV9MyJP9oyS1GVdoolxgqRO5Maop4UuLBWVfhBJYoVOM8k3UWnJEr2bV6IvRwFs2Vz0UtYa2g1bIbNVFVuwxZuCW3kvSILTjZoI3M8xLtKqF0XQzWP-n34c2YtmeOA4PHTGrLtggmW6jHpoW3n-MqtqzRIqcnelrITWawneidvlSeA3Br7vY9xEawvRMSeHLEdN_a2mhqDFHzAZHbUUySCzw6gkuccPlZvhCEnidvT0sE9ua7aPexnooLRO4BKKfALRqQ5FCehr2ZHhXoRXx2Sm7ihM18EJx0Bfz4Dt8VyE4bHTVLtSmS8S5Ma2uv-LEN9k%3D)**.

If you’re interested in making an investment in flipping the House Republican, you needn’t look further than this email. I’m asking you to help me secure ‘**Young Gun’** status this month with a **[contribution of $4 or more](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f69a7afc9e5f40ef831159d85e11345d&_e=akJYptT8k576kEdST8009R0vYYedd4pZe00MBCmDYabx6G-v20M9Ps_buvhVaLPrU-fh-g-8BlVQLmBEcI8Vzy5u9U2CCz82bEsAJ-IJcZYVK56cnfCb03D2l_oKHbrVEhNFJlZEL4nX_0GQz5xO3e9LmTUOt9Z1na0j9G7eUV9MyJP9oyS1GVdoolxgqRO5Maop4UuLBWVfhBJYoVOM8k3UWnJEr2bV6IvRwFs2Vz0UtYa2g1bIbNVFVuwxZuCW3kvSILTjZoI3M8xLtKqF0fu9Jl_b_I-Nhzg0ztyDkpZF3MtinrWd5fUtKha7_SgdvOqoUVN9_jilvamBQsl9HHJCU8uZ3tILMiEnbJVhD3jCS2_mzs4oGxRGwFDbieAjzzrKj7xmU-E3QxmRTvg2KiEHv--e1Axn1mncrUDF5sY3FamyGWiFpa4KYeX9gFcvlYhB-lIK0zcSHROm_O8gr18ywzV5XjrEMp76c9QkffI%3D)** to my campaign right now.

May I please count on your help right now?

clean_body: For the second year in a row, my congressional race is expected to be one of the closest in the nation I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, Have you heard of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s “Young Gun’s Program? ” I hadn’t either until my first campaign for Congress last year. I’d like to give you an explanation as to what the purpose of the program is and The Young Guns program serves to help Republican candidates running in some of the most competitive districts around the country with a playbook on how to vanquish Democrat opposition, along with providing strategic support on everything from polling, fundraising, advertising and grassroots outreach. Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C. – and prove they can WIN. This year, I’m aiming to be one of the first candidates to qualify for the program because with my race expected to be one of the closest in the nation for a second year in a row, . If you’re interested in making an investment in flipping the House Republican, you needn’t look further than this email. I’m asking you to help me secure ‘Young Gun’ status this month with a to my campaign right now. May I please count on your help right now? | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | With sincere thanks, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. body:
| It’s almost time...
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..E9sQ2GOseNVPTz1fu8spwM_w0u1wlNg15VHOjkmJ8pQ)
Peter — We’re only _three days away_ from the start of Build Blue Week! _So we wanted to remind you to register for these incredible events as soon as possible_ — _spots are filling up quickly!_ With special guest speakers like DNC Chair **Jaime Harrison** , these are _can’t-miss_ events. Register right away! | [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..zCQR1xSFY6s6e5uxBajxGTc0FH0XCtG6LSc3mfEdb_s)
---
We have a jam-packed week planned out that aims to provide dedicated Democrats like you with the necessary skills to keep pushing for progressive change!
_Check out some highlights from our lineup:_

* * *

**[Lived Experiences as Candidates](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..SayX9JAUkluSfxXygVlnVzn1WST5h_m7KS0fOZmH3ho)**
**Monday, September 20, 6pm ET**
Join **Pennsylvania State Representative Malcolm Kenyatta** , **Mayor Tishaura Jones of St. Louis,** and moderator**Aisha Dew of Higher Heights** for this lively discussion on the topic of bringing your background, experiences, and unique perspectives to the campaign trail.
During this discussion, you’ll hear from these elected officials about their own stories, as well as get your questions answered about the importance of representative leadership.
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..zgcJ7D3NW_j1EZ1MZOB8bbGrHQtmEvR7u4HzZQ9ApPM)
---

* * *

[**Q &A Session: Inclusive Campaign Practices**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..l2oPK70omt3dn7eyN0U-9FcGI-eVC93Vp4puzRZg0iw)
**Thursday, September 23, 12pm ET**
You will have the chance to learn from **Sean Meloy of LGBTQ Victory Fund** , **Glynda Carr of Higher Heights** , **Ruby Powell-Dennis of Elect Black Women** , and **Vivian Topping of Equality Federation** as they discuss inclusive campaign practices in this special Q&A session.
Bring your burning questions and get ready for an insightful discussion about running equitable, inclusive, and successful campaigns.
[ GO NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..K4G3RJd5VcFED1h5_CbyFCXg-_LBWgRgCe6fza9nCu4)
---
You are doing the work that moves our nation and our communities forward. And Build Blue Week is a chance to take your skills to the next level.
_But space is limited for all of the events, so don’t wait to set your schedule!_

* * *

[**Follow this link to go to NDTC’s Build Blue Week page for a full schedule, lineup, and to RSVP now!**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..WX0eGbtbiDNPKrt4yy_bM0RqoZb4Ba0IyzAdwpPRnhY)
[ GO NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..bkWwW23Su0MkfGRKeNfXE5XFGE2bnNl-G_tOF55M1ho)
---
— National Democratic Training Committee

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I have a very important ask for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruUdFLBB0FIKgvEax7rKUr1D4dXW85V4bDVRkweKKL4sN_mOne9FsjLHdKVCwOCwDc53nrd8vsb3rf21-WAdpsP7vbhLx4LS0b6WnsofhPi6E4jQo7nxlLZ7FVWqQv1akLeUyaDo49dEPFCrsSSzz-G8NMT0Mmu7USyOKNWeuPR5mKOIQjSqplq_iPSGGisWOqSk5wwaTaKqaqYqAJrHY68Vl3au8LE-Nk5vEtWW0RCzJFpKW_RWBWtPv6Ud4hcnAn_axD4EKeOCWdR4BlKjKdHQoqTcEt4uBfEjkb_maRnVi/3fd/4NJK9Hc9SJq2KV0NfD8LCw/h0/GPaDVZoOhyx8TcW-g9--qjFzyJ_5sboK-TnavXzLn_w)
This is Rep. Adam Schiff, team. I have a lot to say. But first I have an important ask for you:

**[Will you split a contribution right now between Common Good VA and Charlie Crist’s campaign to defeat Ron DeSantis?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruUdFLBB0FIKgvEax7rKUr1BrqSSjClX8Uw8Te1C1P_TmFLTAyrS0tNq86Mtx5oqlesYEFA_bzxbQ5ebXTfdV2RgW6k50iLMEAusucooLp1FYHE4PljHhzWDL_7gDXNJLdla7NzaW6GpbwBRPzicZvocRBPcnQjVCeDmQFP97TFg-C_LW_jHJHzvHmN4lMoO-mjxuUXwD0jBpumSY_rXtBhrXbLDwZCH_zIkIpnbkSvezO3Q7vkU-F977E8AZtUtnAHnuVb6T7tfS_F08_rujXnwViHmrCGrSsp8KIVWnbRqW/3fd/4NJK9Hc9SJq2KV0NfD8LCw/h1/d-VVRb0WKCTXaxACUcpKt0qp2b6SFVkDPCFpP1D3n8k) Every dollar is critical to helping defeat Florida Governor Ron DeSantis and helping my friend Charlie raise $15,000 before his fundraising deadline.**

I’ve known Charlie for a long time. We’ve served together in Congress and worked together on critical legislation to help families across America. He and I worked side by side to pass the COVID-19 relief packages and legislation to protect voting rights. I know his character. I’ve seen his work ethic. And he would fight for Floridians in the Governor’s mansion just as he has for years in Congress.

On the flip side, I know a lot about Ron DeSantis, too. Not through working together – but by seeing him stand side by side with the most dangerous president in history. Seeing him grin while signing voter suppression bills in Florida. **And by watching him jockey to use his platform to be the successor to Donald Trump in 2024.**

Things haven’t gotten much better since DeSantis left the House to become Governor of Florida. He’s put more attention into building his profile and trying to disenfranchise voters in his state than trying to help the people of Florida recover from the worst pandemic any of us have ever endured.

**It’s absolutely critical that we defeat DeSantis.** And I believe my friend Charlie is the one to beat him next year. But knowing the modern-day Republican Party, they are going to do everything they can to keep DeSantis in office and tear down Charlie as he seeks to represent the people of Florida.

**So right now, your contribution is critical. Charlie is ready to set the tone for the race and he needs your help to do it.[Please split a donation between Charlie’s campaign and Common Good VA today to help them hit their $15,000 goal.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruUdFLBB0FIKgvEax7rKUr1Bky_dSbhZ7FsyIpUt8TlX85UVTsgEf8gkJms_wquvo5x3xCpMiZRqMcDf2JCsqMg5lpeFBTv2nOTvvknaF3mgtKvUnAMkhcFCmMgSCrjFbwHZKTZh-yiwJGEfyFBCSQKlWTn0CpIsWXBfpKQ9vyP-sCVYMJpPUHmNTwZAHcc9kG0Jx2MjLBTd9NwcJxHm1vMCzEvBVvsigNVQC-DpOD_byvuO_i7HmLIlXWj6xtNPvIz5YWfRO1o1CUsX5c5khLxK7Ln7Rcoa6S6lTQPeu2dqz/3fd/4NJK9Hc9SJq2KV0NfD8LCw/h2/J3BTL_oiFyBRN3rGptcIJ5Ee0FwGSDcpOgaWue4WWNw)**

clean_body: | | | This is Rep. Adam Schiff, team. I have a lot to say. But first I have an important ask for you: Every dollar is critical to helping defeat Florida Governor Ron DeSantis and helping my friend Charlie raise $15,000 before his fundraising deadline. I’ve known Charlie for a long time. We’ve served together in Congress and worked together on critical legislation to help families across America. He and I worked side by side to pass the COVID-19 relief packages and legislation to protect voting rights. I know his character. I’ve seen his work ethic. And he would fight for Floridians in the Governor’s mansion just as he has for years in Congress. On the flip side, I know a lot about Ron DeSantis, too. Not through working together – but by seeing him stand side by side with the most dangerous president in history. Seeing him grin while signing voter suppression bills in Florida. _**BLACK AND LATINO COMMUNITIES ARE CONSERVATIVE COMMUNITIES
THAT’S WHY WE’RE REACHING OUT TO THEM AND WE NEED YOUR HELP **_
* * *

**It’s true, Peter- The most Conservative people in this nation come from the Black and Latino communities, and they’re the ones we reach out to the least.** These communities have been tricked for decades by Democrats using fear and lies to win their votes. It’s time we change that narrative to better our nation.

Statistically, Black and Latino Americans are the most church-going, blue-collar, and family-oriented people in this nation who just want good jobs, school choice for their children, and a community full of Mom & Pop shops. _**That is exactly what Conservatives want, that’s why I need your help.**_

[** Help bring Black and Latino Americans back to the Republican Party! **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0e264035c1dd453a833a1d98adb38d3a&_e=KFk4-q6n-S6LQnIllIcrdHWD2EvJpYnLI9PFTwsYmCMyelDEXd0xKk8cqSVlWL_nhNiQZsQ_TlgTk5hLrn0rsnmsIzCPFrRBaVzHWlXZZmX5ezl-XF0Y6KgbZFQT-VJj4HjChXVKHtkx-HUusyZhzQbm3q2MKOW0EdjHF8V4OGgQ9YQTp3BGUGM86E4xlxJcXffxwGlNdKmWBTX97jak_0pYPBiHaEwy_Hpe2G6HS0jSqc2wyHu29gVI5ukNfXoJMZo4EAsUr_Dgl0B-y_oPEH1bq5Old4X8JO2n1SSlmg7ZouRpF-Y5cvEFEaXePTYRkQf8TZuZFNZlsMczXfa-w8yI30TD1Px2gnt-3wg_rgj7g-NJremjHHfmxLoyuQRPEvnqNTV23oFAeNY8DDNoY9Jtf9jVmyaewb9EZN-sb_qX7pCIsWt0CY6S8SbqjHZ_nOcHZbjsolvppA-EJUkNH5xZim-M_bsPiuBiKKSXenc%3D)
**Since 2016 more individuals from these demographics have voted for a Republican than ever before. If Conservatives don’t reach out to these communities, then that progress** _**will be lost.**_ That’s why the Young Politician Committee is launching _One Nation Summits_ in every major city, and why I’m reaching out to you today. I need your help to bring Conservative leadership back to cities that are drowning in violence and poverty because of failed Democrat policies.

These efforts will decide the fate of this nation and change the political playing field for generations to come. [**Will you take a stand and help us free these communities from the lies of the Democrats?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0e264035c1dd453a833a1d98adb38d3a&_e=KFk4-q6n-S6LQnIllIcrdHWD2EvJpYnLI9PFTwsYmCMyelDEXd0xKk8cqSVlWL_nhNiQZsQ_TlgTk5hLrn0rsnmsIzCPFrRBaVzHWlXZZmX5ezl-XF0Y6KgbZFQT-VJj4HjChXVKHtkx-HUusyZhzQbm3q2MKOW0EdjHF8V4OGgQ9YQTp3BGUGM86E4xlxJcXffxwGlNdKmWBTX97jak_0pYPBiHaEwy_Hpe2G6HS0jSqc2wyHu29gVI5ukNfXoJMZo4EAsUr_Dgl0B-y_oPEHnhIqMaQu4yNGIr1Zc2JpHRcW2ZlxI2TTCKVGZ_sG9v5PCHIN6WX_amds8mkTy9rEHFbPmu7FcDQ-exluUPPJ_Xu4yzlW4Q2IjoGlOaSXEmE8RNMNKsET4cYvoRzHSYYOCs__dNoYlPchDduH9i6fDBbYtvEE8KXlMo48qq7oszaMN_HICQNiKhgUdxjsL-HDMrf3mqIjKHtqhrKjzpr8g%3D)

Democrats have a huge head start on us, so if you’re dedicated to bringing Conservative values and free thought to all Americans while defeating Democrat Dictators in the inner cities, then please help us. [**It doesn’t matter if it’s just $5 or $10, any support you can give will help save these communities from another lifetime of being manipulated by these Democrats.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0e264035c1dd453a833a1d98adb38d3a&_e=KFk4-q6n-S6LQnIllIcrdHWD2EvJpYnLI9PFTwsYmCMyelDEXd0xKk8cqSVlWL_nhNiQZsQ_TlgTk5hLrn0rsnmsIzCPFrRBaVzHWlXZZmX5ezl-XF0Y6KgbZFQT-VJj4HjChXVKHtkx-HUusyZhzQbm3q2MKOW0EdjHF8V4OGgQ9YQTp3BGUGM86E4xlxJcXffxwGlNdKmWBTX97jak_0pYPBiHaEwy_Hpe2G6HS0jSqc2wyHu29gVI5ukNfXoJMZo4EAsUr_Dgl0B-y_oPEG_mfXMIPzq7vEg0zpncapq9FyRxbsQNpN0GxKj3iYjqb4IbPM-5aXY5lrwnDrMftIb8yRSkYqtA_Zx2ZYiGm6AMi20vpV-mWI61YvnNHTK6AGQv4V6GrClTq-Z_yQosRf5ZPoJpzRAfDKDaUI8d55fzXCaCj6x5IZj58u3bK8jx7CDXvUKFBApPml2ocZ6SP3m5Mgy_cPbufX6PM0kk0fA%3D)

clean_body: We need to be in these communities and show them that Conservatives are with them. | BLACK AND LATINO COMMUNITIES ARE CONSERVATIVE COMMUNITIES THAT’S WHY WE’RE REACHING OUT TO THEM AND WE NEED YOUR HELP It’s true, Peter- The most Conservative people in this nation come from the Black and Latino communities, and they’re the ones we reach out to the least. These communities have been tricked for decades by Democrats using fear and lies to win their votes. It’s time we change that narrative to better our nation. Statistically, Black and Latino Americans are the most church-going, blue-collar, and family-oriented people in this nation who just want good jobs, school choice for their children, and a community full of Mom & Pop shops. That is exactly what Conservatives want, that’s why I need your help. Since 2016 more individuals from these demographics have voted for a Republican than ever before. If Conservatives don’t reach out to these communities, then that progress will be lost. That’s why the Young Politician Committee is launching One Nation Summits in every major city, and why I’m reaching out to you today. I need your help to bring Conservative leadership back to cities that are drowning in violence and poverty because of failed Democrat policies. These efforts will decide the fate of this nation and change the political playing field for generations to come. Democrats have a huge head start on us, so if you’re dedicated to bringing Conservative values and free thought to all Americans while defeating Democrat Dictators in the inner cities, then please help us. Thank you, Jacob Wynn** Chairman, Young Politician Committee | | Paid for by the Young Politician Committee PAC www.YPCMTE.org and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Are you concerned that Washington Democrats are destroying the country? If so, here's what you can do about it. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trmddid-kujkulhluu-t/)

### [Changing the Subject](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trmddid-kujkulhluu-d/)
The withdrawal from Afghanistan was a disaster. Biden's poll numbers have tanked. He'll do anything to change the subject. His friends in the press want to help. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trmddid-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trmddid-kujkulhluu-k/)

Joe Biden claims he just got us out of an "endless war." The problem is, one's enemy gets a vote. He also promised he wouldn't pull the troops until all American civilians and our allies were out. He lied. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trmddid-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trmddid-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Should Biden Step Down?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trmddid-kujkulhluu-n/)
Joe Biden is directly responsible for the worst foreign policy blunder in American history. And this is but the latest in a series of critical missteps. Is it time for him to consider stepping aside? body:

clean_body: What they REALLY mean is tax YOU and every other hard-working and over-taxed American. | Peter, Did you see AOC's "TAX THE RICH" dress she wore to the $30,000-per-ticket Met Gala? Credit: Kevin Mazur/MG21/Getty Images When AOC, my Congressional opponent Katie Porter , and the rest of The Squad say "tax the rich," what they REALLY mean is tax YOU and every other hard-working and over-taxed American in order to foot the bill for the multi-trillion dollar wasteful spending spree they've been on since Democrats took over. I'm running against socialist Katie Porte r - one of AOC's buddies - so we can kick these spend-and-tax Democrats out of Congress and win back a Republican majority in Congres, In fact, Peter, I'm a Navy combat veteran who spent my life fighting to uphold the Consitution and the freedoms it guarantees us. Millions of American men and women have died to protect America from tyranny, socialism, terrorism and other forms of oppression AOC and Katie Porter honestly have no idea how horrible it would be to live in a country under the socialist agenda they're trying to force on us. I'm fighting to make sure they never succeed, and I need your help. For America, Shawn Collins U.S. Navy veteran Republican for Congress | | Shawn Collins is a conservative Navy veteran and active Navy Reservist. Having served in Afghanistan, Shawn has spent his life fighting for the Constitution he swore to uphold and defend. He will take that same fighting spirit to the halls of Congress. ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Shawn Collins is a former member of the US Navy. clean_body: I can't sleep | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Hey, I’m sorry to email you so late -- but I can’t sleep. We’re facing our campaign’s major PUBLIC filing deadline at the end of this month. It would be heartbreaking to lose this seat because we didn’t do enough to prepare now. | | | | | | | Please remember: I’ve been a TOP target for Republicans to defeat in past years. And heading into 2022, political experts are predicting that Democrats will need to do EVERYTHING in their power to defend our House Majority. If they sense any weakness, the GOP could unleash millions to buy their way back to the majority... and sabotage everything we’ve been working toward. | | | | | | No regrets, \-- Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. name: John Stossel
subject: How you and I can overthrow the fake news media
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Center for Independent Thought
body:
I have watched the mainstream media transform into a merchant of half-truths, woke propaganda, and a non-stop push for bigger go
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zflr7j742els5lfi8gl3bbgskplltqe16t2oju8o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4ctie8o71c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onhc5on7cjjchob1odjekrbctr0edjmaobnchqeacbie9r3epj464qm0oplm5h3eduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75cb665qbac77mti6cd30m9h3csh5u)

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcv6pbqceuvno83qhk7dphd3u43bmk3u60jdvqqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4ctie8o71c1h2bs)

Friend,

I have watched the mainstream media transform into a merchant of half-truths, woke propaganda, and a non-stop push for bigger government. **I need your help to push back.**

**_I left my ABC News job because they resisted my attempts to report on unintended consequences of big government programs_**. They wouldn't let me explain how free market capitalism was saving lives and lifting billions out of poverty.

Fox News let me, but after 7 years, I gave up my show on FBN because I wanted to reach younger people, people who haven't already made up their minds.

That is why I created **Stossel TV and partnered with Center for Independent Thought.**

Stossel TV has produced more than 400 videos explaining the benefits of free markets and the harm done by big government. Thanks to social media, we don't need TV networks anymore. Young people don't watch Fox or CNN. They surf the web and get their news from Facebook, YouTube, Instagram, Twitter, etc.

A surprise benefit of posting video on the internet is that our videos keep finding new viewers. We've gotten more than 450 million views.

[**You can help Stossel TV reach millions of people by making a donation today. Please click here or one of the links below to donate >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr8it0ofp6ppclu0a730tqndnkbadq16fm8oiabo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4ctie8o71c1h2bs)

[**Donate $20.22 >>>**
**Donate $50 >>>**
**Donate $100 >>>**
**Donate $250 >>>**
**Donate $500 >>>**
**Donate $1,000 >>>**
**Donate $5,000 >>>**
**Donate ANY Amount >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zscfernep18mujh7vt2v9mfrdnbi3ii2it45gteo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4ctie8o71c1h2bs)

My reporting is different from most news on cable and the networks. Most of that is "Donald Trump said today ... !" "Congress just passed ... " "Biden will promise ... " At a time when media is polarizing and politicized, Stossel TV maintains journalistic integrity by covering topics such as Socialism vs. Capitalism, Anti-racist Racists, and Social Media Censorship. We challenge the alarmism that demands more regulations.

These topics remain important year after year, election cycle after election cycle, and that's why our videos keep finding new viewers.

This allows more people to keep learning the truth--years after the video was first released.

**Stossel TV 's rapidly growing views demonstrate people want to hear the facts and think for themselves--despite mainstream media's pro-government, anti-business bias. **

[**Please help me spread our message of free markets, civil liberties, and individualism by making a donation today >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv7j0udciveumsnjlhujgiuqovr5ocq6pdpnqhf8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4ctie8o71c1h2bs)

[**Donate $20.22 >>>**
**Donate $50 >>>**

**Donate $250 >>>**
**Donate $500 >>>**
**Donate $1,000 >>>**
**Donate $5,000 >>>**
**Donate ANY Amount >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4basgi6jvti76uvtfgnkettpsl64kbhce4c6fd8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4ctie8o71c1h2bs)

Your donation will help me produce more videos, reach more viewers, and expose the truth about the corrupt media, government, and political elites.

[**Please click here to make a donation.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztvca7gjvhacl6893lvobmqlm1qrb7vhht3qoph0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4ctie8o71c1h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

In liberty,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z98173clc93sp1bp4o81pupgqusr4tkflm0re6a8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4ctie8o71c1h2bs)
John Stossel
Journalist - _Stossel TV_

clean_body: first debate of the general election | | | = | | Derek, tonight is the night. When I take the debate stage tonight, I will hold Glenn Youngkin accountable for hiding his extreme, right-wing agenda from Virginia voters. Here’s the truth Glenn Youngkin doesn’t want anyone to know: His political mentors are Donald Trump and Ted Cruz. He even says that Donald Trump is the reason he’s running for Governor. He was caught on a secret recording telling a supporter he was going to ban abortion and defund Planned Parenthood. He praised Florida Governor Ron DeSantis for his dangerous pandemic response that puts lives at risk. I’m going to hold Youngkin accountable tonight and I need you with me. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being on my team, Terry McAuliffe =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58338184:6wzGhy25N:m:1:3253819041:5042F7D29D61F644145486E427C6EABA:r)

In a time when Joe Biden is completely failing our great Country, I knew I needed to speak directly to YOU, the American People.

As one Nation, we are mourning the loss of our brave service members due to the barbaric terrorist attack in Afghanistan. These noble American warriors laid down their lives in the line of duty, racing against time to rescue their fellow citizens. They are heroes.

This tragedy should have never taken place. It should NOT have happened, and it would not have happened if I were your President. I promise you that I will never stop fighting to Save America from Joe Biden's disastrous administration.

subject: General Michael Flynn Endorses Former Governor Eric Greitens for US Senate in Missouri
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Lt. General Michael Flynn Endorses Former Governor Eric Greitens for US Senate in Missouri
---
| As [reported by Fox News,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ig__AmfNSo2dEY5wejeiejSCl0qrZLr0cwlmikOhFaEv70NUN1_djQPJJPfN1b1UByb6ENAtCPHt2UgyqQ6fvDYURW2cXhItJLFG6Oo8zw-F4-JI5fkzZ66EFDoRF03LnxOLfq_MGV1sNYHKGVWotbyH95QQndjM3BnQdJgjbZcUPcZqKuOMe_hC5Ac5Nx0v61v62jyGw9hR4JCFFjHPTlduWJ92_pbuiUjYhaVvj8o=&c=HopzLNKZOu24jzI-iKmzK-bZ_eLc1mzwq-3WvkwpMUlpYMqyP1IWZQ==&ch=rYnQ_ZCN60mo7wvvDL6kmv9HWdvpg7-E4nFqy76uD7VjQfDf48xCGg==) former National Security Advisor to President Donald J. Trump and retired U.S. Army Lt. General Michael Flynn released the following statement announcing his endorsement of former Missouri Governor Eric Greitens for the United States Senate in 2022:
"It's clear that now more than ever, America needs fighters. Worse than the radical leftists, the corrupt Deep State, the mainstream media, and Big Tech are the feckless and spineless Republicans who have utterly surrendered.
The people of Missouri recognize that those who betrayed President Trump the most were not the leftists but the cowardly Republicans in Name Only.
That's why I'm endorsing Governor Eric Greitens for the United States Senate. We don't need any more insiders or career politicians in Washington, especially not those with ties to the Chinese Communist Party.
Eric has been a fighter his entire life--as a boxer, a Navy SEAL, as one of the most conservative Governors in the country, and as a leader in the fight to get to the bottom of the 2020 election.
I'm proud to stand with him in our shared mission to revive our Republic."
General Flynn now joins many other national MAGA conservatives who have endorsed Governor Greitens.
Former New York City mayor Rudy Giuliani, Arizona State Senator Wendy Rogers, Dennis Prager, Dr. Sebastian Gorka, Steve Cortes, former Secretary of Interior Ryan Zinke, former NYPD Commissioner Bernie Kerik, and several others have endorsed Governor Greitens.
Kimberly Guilfoyle has also endorsed Governor Greitens and serves as the National Chair of his campaign.
[President Trump's pollster found that Governor Greitens held a massive lead in the race](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ig__AmfNSo2dEY5wejeiejSCl0qrZLr0cwlmikOhFaEv70NUN1_djb1HHeBCMCmcFD_yA-GBQhlmkdZTi7YrIbEpaXg0OqC6E1S_YOPP-n7a53C-JWmuEmKjw7AmS2pk3EFWuKsEs1zcA3NJn94ujDr1_1_R3PI751bzQKWHZpDdqh3DJmDCwDF8iNmiMiLBW5e8VuoXgZzLvJYF2n0Dkfs0SowvjzS9UMsiFo2lvi5mu5yZN_1cPv5MOijVVWwsIg-NAr6a6Uo=&c=HopzLNKZOu24jzI-iKmzK-bZ_eLc1mzwq-3WvkwpMUlpYMqyP1IWZQ==&ch=rYnQ_ZCN60mo7wvvDL6kmv9HWdvpg7-E4nFqy76uD7VjQfDf48xCGg==), with Governor Greitens at 48 percent and the Governor's nearest opponent at 9 percent.
The poll found Governor Greitens has support from 55 percent of those who view Trump favorably.
"This is not a case of winning simply based on higher name ID," pollster Tony Fabrizio wrote. "Governor Greitens is truly the preferred choice on an even playing field."
Support Governor Greitens and join our movement at [EricGreitens.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ig__AmfNSo2dEY5wejeiejSCl0qrZLr0cwlmikOhFaEv70NUN1_djQPJJPfN1b1UnLBu6M5cLRrEEo2zq_o7lUrCj5RGFTKQ5JIWpacr2khP2nbynHyRhthZgG3_cOCQcOXGpWS7S_3Cic2cI0IinQ==&c=HopzLNKZOu24jzI-iKmzK-bZ_eLc1mzwq-3WvkwpMUlpYMqyP1IWZQ==&ch=rYnQ_ZCN60mo7wvvDL6kmv9HWdvpg7-E4nFqy76uD7VjQfDf48xCGg==)!

Instead, our grassroots movement is powered by small dollar donations. As of today, our average donation is $25. This is how I’ve always organized and it’s how we’re growing this campaign: one person at a time, one door at a time, one dollar at a time.
**Putting your constituents’ needs first starts on the campaign trail and that’s why we focus so much on showing up, listening, and building community as we go.**

clean_body: | = | | Peter, Today is thelast day of our mid-month fundraising push -- and to keep it short and sweet -- I’m asking for your help. = | | | = We know that my opponent Republican Madison Cawthorn has raised $2 million for his campaign. We’re taking a different approach. No corporate PAC dollars, no $50,000 a head fundraisers with Donald Trump. Instead, our grassroots movement is powered by small dollar donations. As of today, our average donation is $25. This is how I’ve always organized and it’s how we’re growing this campaign: one person at a time, one door at a time, one dollar at a time. Putting your constituents’ needs first starts on the campaign trail and that’s why we focus so much on showing up, listening, and building community as we go. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for your support. \-- Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Friends – **Last night we fell short of our mid-month deadline.** This isn't great, considering Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and Senate Republicans are already raising hundreds of millions of dollars to take back the Senate – just last month, two McConnell-linked super PACs placed massive ad buys in New Hampshire. **On top of it all, polls are showing this race TIED.** When we miss a goal, even a small one, it leaves our campaign vulnerable. With our FEC deadline at the end of this month, we cannot afford to fall short. **[That's why we're reaching out to our top supporters: Can you rush a $5 donation to get our fundraising back on track and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35872981/306412288/-149339129?refcode=e20210916_mm-goal&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWI3OGFmNi1mYjE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNbXC_1FIJhnzr9_vVD2HdakwCQNOnLaXqyqbcSnFfw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35872982/306412289/-149339129?refcode=e20210916_mm-goal&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWI3OGFmNi1mYjE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNbXC_1FIJhnzr9_vVD2HdakwCQNOnLaXqyqbcSnFfw=)

| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mirHjQmrNc1AIApd7WBN4HSW7be3opHpgpeyODixW92NIW2sqbqSEo_rylVBCBZevocfH5TSWQ5EopR5L9z3dc1rgsE9ggEiGX0rlKR0CvPGBE3j7_8Ui_CVw_OhEFlT-mV1kCDYcZHP4xQpfYc8PYSqW66wQ-2Bty5xVOWBJONoG8JN-_ZQCUz1kSn9nRb9nGQNX2U4jMSNpsvLwhk3C-BrXYfaMxf4LwLxHwQWdtvHJpD7Aq8ADm1kXSGjbZUebkEmnF-JnoqFbxcLjhsapc1mdInbUNVUSlxTdBrlG0gqG0MLbZLHUstk82syIPjgzjvOv3o1l_kY6JBVpywJiEdfRbE8mkNBM0ti8RqbFYnmc/3fd/RFWib1DUT5Gh6SBTpIemBw/h0/M9r3RTqlT1pqqVD92QJdTO_BaqDACvlDrtjpWa1wIKY)
Derek,

In a minute, I’m going to ask you to chip in to support my campaign for Arizona Governor (**[if you’d like to cut to the chase, you can split a donation between my campaign and Common Good VA by clicking this link).](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mirHjQmrNc1AIApd7WBN4HSW7be3opHpgpeyODixW92NIeiRB_Naj9NqjAEP-6MksSuZkSDUtnrBsRNKP_wFFpXUtVN5EelgJQOuXEmohMB4xZaso7df3_1eNyBOGMxxOivfdCw1TqXSSpwxuolranFnsloqnP9yCkKBxeEMaLsIVeAt5rTMuVz_ga4OQM5DLJ2cjCOV05Ybp6b7oM-gEiI5DO7dRrLUcddvqkL2dIVo2OtFAr92WrCi-DuCfJo2Z7oSCxjdfbmJtRiDijqy99j-XgYi4wh1VRr5f4LFe2-opw0RiSd4OS5keRwPUlTC_rTGCJO3TUd8HR6wjy55HxTQXXxq11Ei6ZPfCQVkFcsus/3fd/RFWib1DUT5Gh6SBTpIemBw/h1/qJHLmlCSP2SNmNPlWu_EfB35Fq4zUhNEzMBCQ3Kx1I0)**

First, I wanted to explain why I’m running, and why your support is so important right now.

I’ve spent the last few years serving as Arizona’s Secretary of State. After November’s election, my office had a simple job to do: count every vote. And even in the face of conspiracy theories, false attacks, and death threats, **we got the job done.**

Against all odds, in the middle of a once-in-a-generation pandemic, we proved that our democracy works. But we have so much more work to do to make our government work for all Arizonans.

That’s why I’m running for Governor — because we’ve got a lot of work ahead of us. We need to rebuild and strengthen our economy. We need to make life-saving investments in our health care system. We need to care for our seniors and protect them from fraud. And we need to invest in our schools, our teachers, and the next generation of Arizona leaders.

Arizona deserves a leader who will get the job done, and when I’m elected, that’s exactly what I’ll do.

**[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll consider splitting a $25 donation between my campaign and Common Good VA ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline. We’re counting on supporters like you to help us have a strong showing. Any amount you can chip in will go a long way:](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mirHjQmrNc1AIApd7WBN4HSW7be3opHpgpeyODixW92NLAOp1istQSIUU_TBl9lnqON7Rp-GIR7Zkh27tlg4p1M84epmRxZkXY5X4NEdW04jZhNnNHrvriSRwgtVrLxJ5vg63GymlytPwb-WD0Hj_COKTwtQI6xx6LotbjanRh4G84fWZreWH21k732rdHq5K4wzi0Ajjjb5nB4TScEn28oEL_9uM36XppvvUFfndV9VxQGCqFUYVFOonWtKqdnvwbgjbAvV3mGvQp3y9b0FO7_2ncCVTJNhRqFuZg_bAUIBxZAd-uNRytp57GIzJzouJC4ZI78TwJC3YwIMT6ytPVsfYFc67f8uWXI5IEO1YdNDk/3fd/RFWib1DUT5Gh6SBTpIemBw/h2/BybWIE0L0RhIvL-geTurEs8og95ulYnsRjd2SgDVF4o)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mirHjQmrNc1AIApd7WBN4HSYtbzatkxWIbZUF9FibbCfApZAA7DuK1S0ou6x941UkJlRNQtwAv3F2h33Xu2jhSpq9c2L8AUrfxp5TxX4OLDKFSCKZ2kraSg7wRhygZjMye-5yIz1LCPYz1o5YkA_ScWfU1npOOKZjAzRibEwAqIepPUNDUMkUmcjMmTcBuvwnWEmCWPCgUHvmsLNnnt_vWjhXSCjLTAXWNhRJwfdwEOc-FayhBHDDZ60vKzq2rXaPc88JgYKFS-GF2RaZLKgMVt2XLdgiYXV7OxCO7tJkaPcWsB52QdR0Eq6v_P94T4CumYfyT-v8bbq1tw-QMc0oVs0bG0oC0yYDi07zi-Yb1KQXq_IUK_knEado4O9a6qqry/3fd/RFWib1DUT5Gh6SBTpIemBw/h3/4DQnLNB8QJWpWqgLlFvcy6VylNQizPJb8M36QGofBWw)

Arizona deserves a leader who will get the job done, and when I’m elected, that’s exactly what I’ll do. Thank you for your support. I’m honored to have you on the team. — Katie | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Tim
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=891%2E3611125%2E6Gg9Bp ][IMG]

Morning, folks!

I’m up early today, drinking my coffee after practicing some meditation.
There is something so peaceful about the mornings here before the day gets
going -- I love sitting in my backyard and taking in the fresh air with
Bear and Buckeye at my feet.

Before I hit the campaign trail (and help the kids get ready for school),
I’m taking a look at our numbers -- but I have to say, it’s not great.

We’re way off track for our big $100,000 FEC goal at the end of the month.
If we fall short right before our report goes public, you can bet my
Republican opponents will think Ohio’s open Senate seat is ripe for the
taking.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2766?t=1007&akid=891%2E3611125%2E6Gg9Bp ]We can’t let that happen, Friend. So I’m humbly asking if
you’ll add a donation of any amount today to help us catch up before it’s
too late. Anything you can chip in will make a difference.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2766?t=1008&akid=891%2E3611125%2E6Gg9Bp ]Donate Now

I want you to know how grateful I am for your support. Your grassroots
donation allows us to take on the tough fights and overcome the right-wing
attacks to win this competitive race. When we flip Ohio blue and expand
our Democratic Senate majority, we’ll have you to thank.

Appreciate you,

Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2766?t=1009&akid=891%2E3611125%2E6Gg9Bp ]https://act.timforoh.com/go/2759?t=1010&akid=891%2E3611125%2E6Gg9Bp

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=891%2E3611125%2E6Gg9Bp ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=891%2E3611125%2E6Gg9Bp ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!

When we flip Ohio blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority, we’ll have you to thank. Appreciate you, Tim [ ] [ ][IMG] We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [ ]click here. subject: ICYMI - Pilot Program for household hazardous waste pickup
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://joangreeneaz.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZqb2FuZ3JlZW5lYXouY29tJTJG&sig=H8mdifGCycTxtEwoJvwAsLXx4ikp6rN5jXtaBtTmVNim&iat=1631808597&a=66715302&account=joangreeneaz%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=f4c37e1e8c793c25028af187405f72b3&i=215A226A1A2376)
---
| | **
**Hi,

I believe the city council member’s focus should be on how to improve your neighborhood and quality of life if possible.

Sometimes it’s zoning, improving parks or it may be infrastructure. It is also about keeping you informed about the City of Phoenix services that are available.

City of Phoenix has a pilot program where they will come to your home and pick up paint, batteries, computers, and other household hazardous waste items. The list of items they will and will not pick up is on their website.

Click on the picture to take you to the City of Phoenix website.

****
---
| | [](https://joangreeneaz.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cucGhvZW5peC5nb3YlMkZwdWJsaWN3b3JrcyUyRmdhcmJhZ2UlMkZoYXp3YXN0ZSUyRmNvbGxlY3Rpb24tZXZlbnRz&sig=5DdCGELpgedG1FR1JsxRuMJc9N8Y6C8ZWyDc3PkVMnKc&iat=1631808597&a=66715302&account=joangreeneaz%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=f4c37e1e8c793c25028af187405f72b3&i=215A226A1A2377)
---
| |
This program is for Phoenix residents but check the city you live in for a similar program if available for drop-off location.

[My focus is on you. Support our campaign today!](https://joangreeneaz.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuam9hbmdyZWVuZWF6LmNvbSUyRg==&sig=5vZZhhD81ZPn6jQmtB8rXbqkvnNKveQf5Ddh919tU4fd&iat=1631808597&a=66715302&account=joangreeneaz%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=f4c37e1e8c793c25028af187405f72b3&i=215A226A1A2378)

---
| | Your Community. Your Future.

~ Joan Greene

| | Derek, I know a thing or two about standing on stage with a far-right extremist who thinks he can buy his way into elected office.

— With your help, earlier this year we stopped H.R. 1 /
S. 1 — the Democrats’ election takeover bill — in the U.S. Senate. But
now they’re doubling down.

They just rolled out a bill called the
“Freedom To Vote Act.” Don’t fall for it. It’s more of the same — it
would weaken voter ID, make our elections less secure, and fund
Democrat campaigns with your tax dollars.

Democrats are OBSESSED
with passing this bill, because it would give them TOTAL power, and
they’re going to do and spend whatever it takes to get it to Joe
Biden’s desk.

We must expose this power grab for what it is ASAP.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/dems-election-takeover-i
sback?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021sep16hf&amount=1

right now?

sback?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021sep16hf RUSH

Josh Hawley and Ted Cruz for secure and transparent elections.

helped lead the fight to stop H.R. 1 / S. 1 from putting Washington
Democrats in charge of our elections.

But the Democrats are back for
more — because they know that nationalizing our elections and weakening
voter ID laws would rig the game and give them total control.

It’s
up to us to stand together and stop them before it’s too late.

Here’s the deal, folks. We had to meet our goal to stay on track for the quarter, but now our fundraising is simply not where it needs to be to report strong numbers at the end of the month.
That’s concerning, because each quarter, our campaign files our fundraising with the Federal Election Commission, or FEC. That report goes public, so everyone, including Senate Republicans and other opponents to our work on climate action, can see how many people have given — or _haven’t_ given — to our movement.
We can’t afford to lose momentum when we’re so close to passing once-in-a-generation climate legislation. And on the campaign side, we’re supporting New Mexico races up and down the ballot, and helping make sure swing-state senators like Mark Kelly, Maggie Hassan, and Rev. Raphael Warnock win their races and defend our Senate majority. It’s so important we have the resources to keep up this work.
But here’s the good news: If 23 people from Albuquerque chip in before midnight tonight, we’ll be in great shape to make up what we lost.

clean_body: We spent the morning tallying up the numbers, folks, and we have some bad news: We missed our mid-month goal last night. Can you add a contribution of any amount to help make up lost ground? We’ll explain why this is so important in a moment. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Here’s the deal, folks. We had to meet our goal to stay on track for the quarter, but now our fundraising is simply not where it needs to be to report strong numbers at the end of the month. That’s concerning, because each quarter, our campaign files our fundraising with the Federal Election Commission, or FEC. That report goes public, so everyone, including Senate Republicans and other opponents to our work on climate action, can see how many people have given — or haven’t given — to our movement. We can’t afford to lose momentum when we’re so close to passing once-in-a-generation climate legislation. And on the campaign side, we’re supporting New Mexico races up and down the ballot, and helping make sure swing-state senators like Mark Kelly, Maggie Hassan, and Rev. Raphael Warnock win their races and defend our Senate majority. It’s so important we have the resources to keep up this work. But here’s the good news: If 23 people from Albuquerque chip in before midnight tonight, we’ll be in great shape to make up what we lost. Please, will you be one of the 23 folks we’re counting on to donate? Any amount will make a difference. subject: Hispanic and Latino Americans are a vital part of our nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
This week marks the beginning of Hispanic Heritage Month |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux5rTXePTq_zAzKi5TP0ML37mKy3KTw90d934ij7OoBEwghvEksxeyA8k9d-WW0GHZ-0V3Nihhi5nhcw5hywZVM_7HZiVHpTRH2zefC4FqNu7PFWKDTiPHdeg-XIy8bUSlxUxYyBsDKrrvGfCNn1WJdJWuqCiNKb1TFDYjp_tuqx69PWFfWYu2Wj8iWqFDtxYgn2lAH0pkF1pg9jpj7QQ_SwSv7o2OVnnWvVNucho8FaAqzHmuSpuWJ9AIABtrVEWlaommSf_6oh-ULtYsjdJHihkrhuysJermaObKk6t39Fhy0gIrzIxuKrONujMDl8SJzUeRv-sXyIkzIKvRGGKZmlzh8o1HM9yoVKRoB_vjRDvWANSW_-DBEv-JYECBIf0NQ/3fd/D6kSfQIARimebX0CKFETnA/h0/AX2NILLsSqk36toSeg5Bbk4AhAWyhZ2Z0MOWnax2wn8)

| | Team,

This week marks the beginning of Hispanic Heritage Month -- an opportunity for all Americans to reflect on the **important role Hispanic and Latino Americans have played throughout history in growing and strengthening American society,** the richness of our culture, and the strength of our industries.

Latinos are a vital part of our nation -- _in Northern Ohio, the Hispanic community has helped advance and enrich our community in _all_ walks of life._

It’s critical that we invest in Hispanic and Latino communities across the country. Hispanic families continue to be disproportionately affected by the COVID-19 health crisis and bear the brunt of the economic shock to our system caused by the ongoing pandemic.

**We are a stronger, more vibrant nation when we create more opportunities for all citizens.** That is why Rep. Marcy Kaptur is a strong advocate for Nueva Esperanza Community Credit Union; a banking institution that serves a predominantly Latino clientele in south Toledo -- _helping secure additional funds to increase lending and investment options for residents in that community._

From Toledo to Lorain to Cleveland, Rep. Kaptur has worked to deliver results that boost working families of Latino descent.

Our district is recovering and being pushed _forward_ in great part by the hard work of Hispanic and Latino residents and their commitment to ensuring that families in OH-09 are prioritized.

**We must continue to build on our current progress to ensure that all Latinos have a meaningful opportunity to achieve the American Dream.**

Together, we can secure a brighter future for all,

\-- Team Kaptur

| Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. **Can you help us send Marcy Kaptur back to Congress?**

name: Navarre for Congress Finance Team
subject: It’s been five months
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Team,
It’s been five months since we launched the campaign and we couldn’t be more proud of the work we’ve done thus far. We wanted to make sure you saw James’ message from yesterday because we believe it really sums up exactly what Stewart and this campaign stand for.
As you know, we’re coming up on an FEC reporting deadline at the end of the month. So in honor of our five months as a team, we were wondering if you could chip in just $5 to help us finish the quarter on a high note. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2109-q3-sn-eoq?refcode=210916-email&amount=5]
-- Navarre for Congress Finance Team
---- Forwarded Message ----
Peter,
We’re halfway through September, which means we only have a few weeks until our campaign will release our first full FEC report. That means our competitors will be able to see exactly how much money we’ve raised and how we’ve spent it. In other words, it shows how strong our grassroots campaign is.
We need to prove that we mean business and we intend to flip VA-01 BLUE! But the only way to have a strong report is if supporters like you help us finish these last two weeks off strong. Can I count on you to make a $10 donation to Stewart’s campaign today to ensure September is our best month yet? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2109-q3-sn-eoq?refcode=210916-email&amount=10]
$10 may not seem like a lot. But if 100 folks give $10 today, we’ve turned an individual action into a grassroots movement. That’s what real change looks like and it’s what our campaign is all about.
So can you chip in $10 today and become a part of our movement to restore dignity and integrity to Virginia’s First District? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2109-q3-sn-eoq?refcode=210916-email&amount=10]
All the best,
James
Stewart Navarre is a Democrat running for Virginia's 1st Congressional District. He's ready to serve his fellow Virginians with integrity, ethics, and hard work. Support Stewart with a donation today.

Stewart Navarre for Congress
PO Box 150
Fredericksburg, VA 22404
United States

name: Diego Rodriguez
subject: Standing up for the little guy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Diego for AG
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35880096/306439249/-1716317403?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTdkM2NiYS0wYzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EXV5O--lhfxJFRbHsdql-zm5IJKhHp8nfmKSXn2FRFc=&emci=8fa8ac1c-5216-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=fa7d3cba-0c17-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10950315)
---
One of my top priorities as Attorney General will be **consumer protection**.

I grew up in a trailer park with six siblings, so I know how many obstacles you face at the bottom. Getting cheated in the marketplace _shouldn't_ be on that list.

At the end of the day, corporations are _not people_. They do not eat, sleep, raise families, and try to make ends meet. They do not get to vote in our elections. And they **do not** get to take advantage of consumers through unfair practices.

[**Join me in defending hard working folks across Arizona by chipping in $20 >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35880098/306439258/2127152568?refcode=X_091621_ConsumerProtection&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTdkM2NiYS0wYzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EXV5O--lhfxJFRbHsdql-zm5IJKhHp8nfmKSXn2FRFc=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35880100/306439266/2127152568?refcode=X_091621_ConsumerProtection&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTdkM2NiYS0wYzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EXV5O--lhfxJFRbHsdql-zm5IJKhHp8nfmKSXn2FRFc=)
---
In the office of the Attorney General,**I will look out for people like you and me, not special interests with deep pockets. **That means breaking up monopolies, shutting down frauds and scams, and fighting for fair prices — because corporations don't need advantages where everyday folks have none.

[**Support my campaign to become the people's attorney by chipping in now >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35880102/306439270/2127152568?refcode=X_091621_ConsumerProtection&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTdkM2NiYS0wYzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EXV5O--lhfxJFRbHsdql-zm5IJKhHp8nfmKSXn2FRFc=)

Thank you!

_\-- Diego_

**Rep. Diego Rodriguez is running for Attorney General to be the People's Attorney, focused on our needs instead of partisan stunts. As a lifelong Democrat, a prosecutor, a defense attorney, and now as a State Representative, Diego is the most experienced and most qualified candidate that we can trust to fight for our rights.**

[**Will you join Team Diego by chipping in a few dollars now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35880104/306439272/2127152568?refcode=X_091621_ConsumerProtection&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTdkM2NiYS0wYzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EXV5O--lhfxJFRbHsdql-zm5IJKhHp8nfmKSXn2FRFc=)

clean_body: | One of my top priorities as Attorney General will be consumer protection. I grew up in a trailer park with six siblings, so I know how many obstacles you face at the bottom. Getting cheated in the marketplace shouldn't be on that list. At the end of the day, corporations are not people. They do not eat, sleep, raise families, and try to make ends meet. They do not get to vote in our elections. And they do not get to take advantage of consumers through unfair practices. = | = In the office of the Attorney General,I will look out for people like you and me, not special interests with deep pockets. That means breaking up monopolies, shutting down frauds and scams, and fighting for fair prices — because corporations don't need advantages where everyday folks have none. = Thank you! \-- Diego Rep. Diego Rodriguez is running for Attorney General to be the People's Attorney, focused on our needs instead of partisan stunts. As a lifelong Democrat, a prosecutor, a defense attorney, and now as a State Representative, Diego is the most experienced and most qualified candidate that we can trust to fight for our rights. = = = Diego for AG PO Box 545 Phoenix, AZ 85001 United States | PAID FOR BY Diego for AG. Authorized by Diego Rodriguez.

body:
I'm entrusting you with this...
Promises made, promises broken.

After 18 months of bureaucrats moving the goalposts:
* No masks
* Masks
* TWO MASKS
* Voluntary vaccine and no mask
* Voluntary vaccine but still mask

Joe Biden has instituted a Vaccine Mandate on nearly 100 million Americans. _**A Vaccine Mandate he promised not to do.**_ | [STOP VACCINE MANDATES NOW ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58340273:6Je1fy26N:m:1:3253819041:F859A77250BCCDC19D1D1688D5E37DFF:r)
In defending the need for this requirement, Joe Biden is taking the fight to **YOU** ; saying **YOU** have forced him to do this. name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Redistricting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

My campaign manager, Hannah, reached out yesterday to let you know that the first draft of the 2022 Congressional map was released – and that it’s not looking too good for our campaign.
**[I’ll explain further in a moment, but first, if you’re able to contribute to help me win re-election no matter what the 2022 map looks like, you can do so here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35880359/306440261/-271015136?refcode2=b54ca49e-0d17-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210916-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTRjYTQ5ZS0wZDE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E4Lra7ehRj0GiKpqW6qB2YwKzuP5Rev5s7-ZSQTCPNE=)**
Alright, here’s the situation. As it stands, New York’s 17th district comprises much of Westchester and Rockland Counties. But the newly proposed map from the New York Independent Redistricting Commission would shift our district to comprise more of Putnam County, a district that went for Trump in 2020.
**If this map, or a similar one, were implemented, Republicans and potentially even other Democrats would jump at the opportunity to unseat me — and it would be much more difficult for our team to win re-election.**
Preparing for unfavorable redistricting means we need to be ready to conduct voter outreach in places where we haven’t competed before. That’s possible, but to tell you the truth, it will cost a lot of money. That’s why my team and I decided to extend our $15,000 fundraising drive another 24 hours. Please, if you’re able:
**[Make a contribution here to help us hit our financial goals so we can go up against challengers in both the primary and general elections and win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35880361/306440263/-271015136?refcode2=b54ca49e-0d17-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210916-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTRjYTQ5ZS0wZDE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E4Lra7ehRj0GiKpqW6qB2YwKzuP5Rev5s7-ZSQTCPNE=)**
In just a few weeks, we’ll be in the last quarter of the year, and we’ll have to start ramping up our planning for the upcoming primary. I know that our movement has what it takes to win no matter what the parameters of our district look like, but we can’t do it without your support.
Thank you for reading, and I’ll provide updates when I have them.
\- Mondaire

As it stands, New York’s 17th district comprises much of Westchester and Rockland Counties. But the newly proposed map from the New York Independent Redistricting Commission would shift our district to comprise more of Putnam County, a district that went for Trump in 2020. If this map, or a similar one, were implemented, Republicans and potentially even other Democrats would jump at the opportunity to unseat me — and it would be much more difficult for our team to win re-election. Preparing for unfavorable redistricting means we need to be ready to conduct voter outreach in places where we haven’t competed before. That’s possible, but to tell you the truth, it will cost a lot of money. That’s why my team and I decided to extend our $15,000 fundraising drive another 24 hours. Please, if you’re able: = In just a few weeks, we’ll be in the last quarter of the year, and we’ll have to start ramping up our planning for the upcoming primary. I know that our movement has what it takes to win no matter what the parameters of our district look like, but we can’t do it without your support. Thank you for reading, and I’ll provide updates when I have them. \- Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Capitol St. SW Suite 407 Washington, DC 20003 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Mondaire with a contribution, =.

| | Derek,

I’m going to level with you: Trump-backed candidate for governor, Glenn Youngkin, poses the biggest threat to Virginia’s progress in a generation.

If he wins, that’s the ball game. Everything from Virginia’s health care to our freedom to vote will be in danger.

Derek, we have to make sure Terry McAuliffe has everything he needs to stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin.

**[Terry is looking for $250,000 before his first debate with Glenn Youngkin -- can you chip in right now and do your part?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35883834/306451040/1097049879?refcode=20210916.3_JC_9CV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGJiNDdiYS0xMzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7AmY9QnYMPC4YtzxE5rgRY3lz2Bl1OE6k5uyogvb3NM=)**

Here’s another sad fact. Youngkin winning ain’t just bad for Virginia, it’s a nightmare for America.

Donald Trump endorsed Youngkin and Glenn is shouting that endorsement from the rooftops. In fact, Youngkin is so much like Trump that folks are starting to call him “Glenn Trumpkin.”

Look, I don’t care what you call him. All I care about is what election experts are calling Virginia: 2021’s most important race.

Derek, we worked too damn hard to fire Donald Trump for us to let him resurrect his political career by helping Glenn Youngkin become Virginia’s next Governor.

**[I’m counting on you to do your part to stop them. Youngkin is planning on spending $75 million of his own money to win and any contribution, no matter the amount, would be a huge help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35883835/306451041/1097049879?refcode=20210916.3_JC_9CV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGJiNDdiYS0xMzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7AmY9QnYMPC4YtzxE5rgRY3lz2Bl1OE6k5uyogvb3NM=)**

Thanks,

James Carville | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35883836/306451042/-2023814932?refcode=20210916.3_JC_9CV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGJiNDdiYS0xMzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7AmY9QnYMPC4YtzxE5rgRY3lz2Bl1OE6k5uyogvb3NM=)

Friend,
Earlier this month we told you about Juan Ciscomani, the first Republican to enter the race for AZ-02. He's the Governor's right hand man, and we don't have to remind you what a disaster Doug Ducey has been as Governor. His failed policies have devastated Southern Arizona families, by defunding our schools and prolonging the COVID crisis.
Now, another Republican, Dr. Douglas Lowell has jumped into the race for AZ-02. After watching his announcement video, all we can say is...yikes.
**If you thought the Ducey Disciple was bad, wait until you meet this guy.**
The video, which can charitably be described as a "border wall infomercial" was **a love letter to President Trump** and his failed attempt to further militarize our border.
Don't get us wrong, securing the border is important. But this is a complicated issue that requires a balanced and comprehensive approach, not just calling for more walls and more guns.
We don't know who will win the Republican Primary. The Governor's pick is certainly the favored choice of establishment Republicans. But we've seen hardliners ride the wave of anti-immigrant fervor to victory in Republican primaries before (anyone remember Randy Graf and Jesse Kelly?).
**Regardless of who wins that primary, we know they'll be extremely well-funded. **The Republican Party and the corporate PACs that fund them will spend tens of millions of dollars to buy back this seat. We can't let that happen.
[**So we need you to pitch in today to show that we're ready for whatever they throw at us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35885299/306455460/41694283?refcode=X_091621_RadicalRightOpponent&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTYxNzBlYi0xNzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iP7LEbNgBTrLNgnBa3QyApJJRhWVjbdQHoGrYPPED_8=)

Now, another Republican, Dr. Douglas Lowell has jumped into the race for AZ-02. After watching his announcement video, all we can say is...yikes. If you thought the Ducey Disciple was bad, wait until you meet this guy. The video, which can charitably be described as a "border wall infomercial" was a love letter to President Trump and his failed attempt to further militarize our border. Don't get us wrong, securing the border is important. But this is a complicated issue that requires a balanced and comprehensive approach, not just calling for more walls and more guns. We don't know who will win the Republican Primary. The Governor's pick is certainly the favored choice of establishment Republicans. But we've seen hardliners ride the wave of anti-immigrant fervor to victory in Republican primaries before (anyone remember Randy Graf and Jesse Kelly?). Regardless of who wins that primary, we know they'll be extremely well-funded. The Republican Party and the corporate PACs that fund them will spend tens of millions of dollars to buy back this seat. We can't let that happen. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you for all you're doing, Team Engel Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please._

name: D. Peter Willis
subject: Fwd: only $1 (re: Gavin Newsom)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
And another from Monday, when polls definitely did not show Republicans gaining on Newsom.

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: our earnest plea (via info@unitedemocrats.org) <info@unitedemocrats.org>
Date: Sep 13, 2021 at 11:01:15 PM
Subject: only $1 (re: Gavin Newsom)
To: Peter Willis <dpwillis67@gmail.com>

| **We told you** with less than 24 hours until the pivotal California recall ends, polls show Republicans gaining on governor Gavin Newsom.

**We told you** if we do nothing Republicans will be on track to steamroll our governor and take over blue California.

**Now we’re telling you anything you give in this critical moment will help us stop this recall. We need 500 Democrats to step up before midnight.**

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Our work has never been more important – or urgent
body:
Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**Judicial Watch** continues to break new ground fighting for the principle "Because no one is above the law!" which is both our motto _and_ our motivation.
Today we are taking on **_more lawsuits_ , _more investigations_** and **_more critical public education_** on behalf of the rule of law. And we are doing all of this at a very critical time for our nation which is why **_[I am asking you to make your best donation today to Judicial Watch.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56691&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MTYxNDEzMjM=)_**
**_[Your support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56691&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MTYxNDEzMjM=)_** will help us investigate and file lawsuits to fight for _honest elections_ , defend _conservative free speech_ against attacks **by Big Media** and **Big Government** , challenge _illegal immigration_ and expose taxpayer funding of Marxist **_Critical Race Theory_** propaganda in our schools and government. Here are a few highlights:

* **We sued Colorado, North Carolina and Pennsylvania for failing to obey federal law requiring they take reasonable steps to keep their voter registration rolls accurate**. "Dirty" voter rolls are an invitation to voter fraud, and our **Election Integrity** team is now reviewing new federal voter data with an eye to _challenging more states_ over their failure to remove ineligible and inactive names between elections.

* **_We are taking on Big Tech and Big Government censorship of conservative Americans_**. For example, we exposed state officials in **California** and **Iowa** who worked with **Big Tech** to suppress and censor conservative posts about the 2020 elections (_including a Judicial Watch post_). And we sued three federal government agencies related to what appear to be **Biden** **administration** efforts to monitor and/or silence conservatives critical of government policy.

* **_We have active lawsuits to combat illegal sanctuary policies_** that aid and abet illegal immigration; and to expose the unprecedented attack on the rule of law by **the Biden administration 's REFUSAL to enforce our immigration laws**.

* **_We are using state open records laws_ to expose the widespread misuse of _taxpayer dollars_ to indoctrinate public school students in the Marxist, racist and truly un-American "Critical Race Theory."** We also filed a federal lawsuit on behalf of a **Dedham, Massachusetts** father, who was fired from his job as head football coach after raising concerns about his daughter's seventh-grade ancient history class curriculum peddling "**Critical Race Theory** " and **Black Lives Matter**)

You can see why I'm **_[asking for your urgent help](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56691&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MTYxNDEzMjM=)_**. Indeed, as I write you my colleagues and I are initiating a major new investigation into **Biden 's Afghanistan disaster **which led to the preventable deaths of 13 American troops! We expect to be in federal court suing for answers on Biden's betrayal and surrender to the Taliban.
We are committed to delivering on all our important, history-making, anti-corruption investigations and lawsuits because today our nation especially needs us. **_Please make_** _**[your best donation now to Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56691&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MTYxNDEzMjM=)**._ Our work has never been more important - _or urgent_! Thank you.
Sincerely,
Tom Fitton President
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56691&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MTYxNDEzMjM=)
---
|
---
|
---

Washington, DC 20024

| |
