name: John Stossel
subject: How you and I can overthrow the fake news medi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Center for Independent Thought
body:
have watched the mainstream media transform into a merchant of half-truths
_Sponsored message_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z20j40mv2tfhuls6d65s5pt5pmaeog4078s25bu0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3i6aoj6clh2bs)

Friend,

I have watched the mainstream media transform into a merchant of half-truths, woke propaganda, and a non-stop push for bigger government. **I need your help to push back.**

**_I left my ABC News job because they resisted my attempts to report on unintended consequences of big government programs_**. They wouldn't let me explain how free market capitalism was saving lives and lifting billions out of poverty.

Fox News let me, but after 7 years, I gave up my show on FBN because I wanted to reach younger people, people who haven't already made up their minds.

That is why I created **Stossel TV and partnered with Center for Independent Thought.**

Stossel TV has produced more than 400 videos explaining the benefits of free markets and the harm done by big government. Thanks to social media, we don't need TV networks anymore. Young people don't watch Fox or CNN. They surf the web and get their news from Facebook, YouTube, Instagram, Twitter, etc.

A surprise benefit of posting video on the internet is that our videos keep finding new viewers. We've gotten more than 450 million views.

[**You can help Stossel TV reach millions of people by making a donation today. Please click here or one of the links below to donate >>>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztc9s9pql8ulf7mqur9hdv3u4n7nedmabdvl4ap8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3i6aoj6clh2bs)

[**Donate $20.22 >>>**
**Donate $50 >>>**
**Donate $100 >>>**
**Donate $250 >>>**
**Donate $500 >>>**
**Donate $1,000 >>>**
**Donate $5,000 >>>**
**Donate ANY Amount >>>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z82ts3r8256u19c6vmv2nr8r2qr01gpg696k6b9g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3i6aoj6clh2bs)

My reporting is different from most news on cable and the networks. Most of that is "Donald Trump said today ... !" "Congress just passed ... " "Biden will promise ... " At a time when media is polarizing and politicized, Stossel TV maintains journalistic integrity by covering topics such as Socialism vs. Capitalism, Anti-racist Racists, and Social Media Censorship. We challenge the alarmism that demands more regulations.

These topics remain important year after year, election cycle after election cycle, and that's why our videos keep finding new viewers.

This allows more people to keep learning the truth--years after the video was first released.

**Stossel TV 's rapidly growing views demonstrate people want to hear the facts and think for themselves--despite mainstream media's pro-government, anti-business bias. **

[**Please help me spread our message of free markets, civil liberties, and individualism by making a donation today >>>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znfrjf5u531u4aa8919lurgdd5bues6odk8adg3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3i6aoj6clh2bs)

**Donate $1,000 >>>**
**Donate $5,000 >>>**

Your donation will help me produce more videos, reach more viewers, and expose the truth about the corrupt media, government, and political elites.

[**Please click here to make a donation.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7ke9o3pmfshskvds4nnl207ootv3153r7rh0bt8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3i6aoj6clh2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

In liberty,

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcfoddj8ft94lcr23qfgbkpt59jo1385lqkev6t8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3i6aoj6clh2bs)

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: This is the future
body:

| Peter -
This past weekend, more than 2,000 young people between the ages of 14-24 came together to hear from a tremendous lineup of speakers and get energized about the future of the conservative movement.
This is the future.

| | | [DONATE. | As Politico put it, "Dan Crenshaw is building a young activist army, one summit at a time.... It's working."
The feedback we received after the event was incredible. One attendee said the Youth Summit "fully motivated me to achieve everything I plan for my future."
We're already planning our next Youth Summit, and we want it to be even bigger than this year's. But we need the resources to do it.
I'm not like other politicians. I don't spend all of my money on boring campaign commercials or political consultants. I use my donations for events like the Crenshaw Youth Summit. And I'm asking for your support to continue putting together events like this.
[Can I count on your support to help me continue to grow our conservative movement for generations to come?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dIPXyn5dOqQdmsu3suJI9LsI4y1abt4pAsaMlV1mpNjzbxwK2qb4N8bVychQzzXMSaSlfsNCvEEG5qxCu70oDxDmGszaQ-uJ17quV5Hc_-3HVQM1msoPeqyzVr5-qgDdBTiMuz3mJaVgCJDpxVkyvBcffdeuVYeAzogjn-yyUWHO-p6QAtWG688GFIwl_kW3UU2XYu3UdtTLdH1XBO47OSCN1O-pvB72FPvU2198xrlk3KJTkFlYcPO76d7IIpujUoCQR2g7sx48AeQBYoc5G8ezimxc-Pz2TTAhWmAUQVvrRzdysrFm11_ID1tapRUWbgbglF5gPb-P1l75td9hP9yFImrBl84zD1GM4XiH92xdEyNQLJdm6HccKEvwvIQuOvmgCeGqcRg=&c=GE30BAcNISbrufJKGxuZRhMjOcV6kn0XVZQpJSDGKzkWM9J-oiMiSw==&ch=RsxCJPE2XCjJbO_jxhn_wVxG9EzSEyg34BDRFziUYTm9-aDZcGQJGQ==)

name: Special Election Alert
subject: This November: send Allison Russo to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Here’s the deal, friend:

Republicans need to win just FIVE seats in order to take back the House next year and curb all the hard-fought progress we’ve made under the Biden Administration.

But we have an opportunity THIS NOVEMBER to push back against their efforts by expanding our Democratic House Majority and sending Allison Russo to Congress.

Allison’s special election is our ONLY shot at flipping a red seat blue this year, but she needs our help to get the job done. Will you split a contribution between Allison and Seth Moulton now to help her finish this campaign strong and win this race?

secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-russo?refcode=20210916_split

Friend, Allison is a public health expert and advocate for working families. In her first race for the statehouse, she flipped a deep red seat blue, and there’s no doubt she can do the same here.

As a State Representative, Allison has fought tirelessly to deliver for her constituents and bring good-paying jobs, access to affordable health care, quality childhood care, and strong public education. She is exactly the type of independent leader Ohioans deserve working for them in Congress.

Allison is up against Mike Carey -- a Trump-backed coal lobbyist bankrolled by big special interests who will stop at nothing to keep this seat in Republican hands. The stakes are too high to stay on the sidelines, Friend.

I know Allison can flip OH-15 blue, but only by building a true grassroots movement of hard-working people fighting for our shared values. That’s why I’m asking: Will you split a contribution of $15 or whatever you can spare between Allison’s campaign and Seth Moulton today?

secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-russo?refcode=20210916_split

Thank you for stepping up,

Special Election Alert
(via Team Moulton)

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/864ac4a7-1017-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/b70c39b5-1b17-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzBjMzliNS0xYjE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J1vrqlE-phxEZ6JQ6BZ3KEtINbhd38-JBfm3TvlfIt8=&id=100807537 .

name: Patty Murray
subject: Here’s what’s at risk:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Next November might seem far away, but the truth is that Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already doing everything they can to take back the Senate.
#
Peter,
I’ve written to you before about how important it is to keep our Democratic majority in the Senate. I’m doing everything I can to fight for paid leave, child care, affordable health care, action on climate, reproductive rights, and so much more, but our progress is at risk if we can’t keep the Senate blue.
**[We can’t lose our momentum now. Will you pitch in $1, $5 -- or anything you can -- before midnight tomorrow to defend the Democratic Senate majority and help us stay in the fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35888387/306461894/258923750?refcode=pm_em_210916_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTIwZWVmYS0xYzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8YBZArMJLQ7j8avISi_VVYYyOHQDo2KM0bZQgv_CGJA=)**
Next November might seem far away, but the truth is that Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already doing everything they can to take back the Senate.
In the other Washington, I’m making sure our government helps families, not corporate interests, but Republicans are trying to block our progress every chance they get.
If we lose even a single seat in 2022, the GOP could roll back all the progress we’re fighting so hard for. There is still so much more we need to do to help families, workers, and communities, and I need each and every one of you with me.
**[Will you contribute $5 before our mid-month deadline tomorrow at midnight to protect the Democratic Senate majority and defend our progress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35888388/306461895/258923750?refcode=pm_em_210916_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTIwZWVmYS0xYzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8YBZArMJLQ7j8avISi_VVYYyOHQDo2KM0bZQgv_CGJA=)**
Thank you,
Patty

** **

subject: NOW LAUNCHING: The Primary Power Fund 💪
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
#
We are 239 days into Democrats controlling Congress and the Presidency. But the political establishment has spent that time protecting the status quo.
**Just this summer, Corporate Democrats have stalled progress on climate change, infrastructure, and abortion access.** If we want to win a Green New Deal, pass Medicare for All, or cancel student loan debt, we'll need to elect candidates who are ready to fight for working people -- not corporate interests.
We know the transformational power of a primary. In 2018, Justice Democrats helped AOC oust corporate puppet Joe Crowley. In 2020 we helped Jamaal Bowman defeat Elliot Engel, Cori Bush win against William Lacey Clay, and Marie Newman unseat anti-choice Democrat Dan Lipinski.
With the 2022 midterms on the horizon, we're launching the Primary Power Fund to leverage our organizing power, challenge the status quo, and ensure that our candidates have the resources we need to defeat corporate Democrats in 2022. **[Will you be a founding donor of the Primary Power Fund today so we can fully fund our electoral work? Our newest Justice Democrats, Rana Abdelhamid, Odessa Kelly, Kina Collins, and Jessica Cisneros, are counting on your support.](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=0ea2117762&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
[](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=a8fb9ab092&e=5a4b10d0ec)
**[Primary Power Fund](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=015ab53b67&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
The Democratic Party and its establishment candidates have an entire ecosystem of campaign resources -- from political technology, volunteer lists, campaign fundraising support from PACs and big donor money. All to raise millions of dollars to elect candidates who are doing nothing to improve the lives of working people in Congress.
There are also powerful right-wing interests already spending money on Facebook ads, TV commercials, and text messages to smear the Squad. They will likely start directing their racist, xenophobic right-wing lies at our four primary challengers soon enough. We're relying on you to help us have the funds to fight back.
[When you contribute $3, $9, or $27 to the Primary Power Fund, you are sending a message that the status quo Democratic Party isn't good enough. Will you send a message and become a Primary Power Fund founding donor today?](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=de249fdb61&e=5a4b10d0ec)
**[Primary Power Fund](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=aa2e197371&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
With your support, we'll elect the next generation of Justice Democrats to challenge corporate Democrats and join Alexandria, Jamaal, Marie, and Cori in fighting for working people in the halls of Congress.
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Have a moment, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
with a 50-50 Senate, we can’t afford to make any mistakes or lose a single seat
#
I’m going to be honest with you, Peter: the fight to keep the Senate blue in 2022 is not going to be an easy one.
Mitch McConnell and the Republicans are already making plans to take back the Senate, recruiting challengers and running ads against vulnerable Democrats. And with a 50-50 Senate, we can’t afford to make any mistakes or lose a single seat.
**[Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or any amount before our mid-month deadline tomorrow to defend the Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35890097/306468033/1367154280?refcode=dd_em_210916_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmYwNDU4Zi0yMTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u461ZliiF3gJhEde-KQojw64aaj4UjFwvQRuwXsQodQ=)**

clean_body: with a 50-50 Senate, we can’t afford to make any mistakes or lose a single seat I’m going to be honest with you, Peter: the fight to keep the Senate blue in 2022 is not going to be an easy one. Mitch McConnell and the Republicans are already making plans to take back the Senate, recruiting challengers and running ads against vulnerable Democrats. And with a 50-50 Senate, we can’t afford to make any mistakes or lose a single seat. = I’m working hard with my fellow Senate Democrats to protect voting rights, pass bold immigration reform, and fix our broken criminal justice system -- but our continued progress depends on defending our majority. = My best, Dick Durbin = _ * Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: John Castorani
subject: Hillary Clinton lied. Americans died.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
The 4 a.m. call Hillary Clinton wouldn't take caused four Americans to lose their lives, and changed mine forever. Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=f557b0e783df474daf17a224ba19289d&_t=LHM-ujmTzPKUJhQf-jeM9XkFpQek3zzFyb3BpM4ytGQ59j1xIOOKy_ZgtuD-0wlq3HsVjHd1NbsaGT5-de3na-ZSz83iyDW6tPmvG6zxs9yJ9GCaMChiETLW-V0QVDCTYq5BSobjh5_OdhMEcMP9cuBOuRmeSFJ14z9nlja9JfA%3D) | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f557b0e783df474daf17a224ba19289d&_e=xn2hsAReFZsELxcrL7lHHRwt7TNwJN7YePl9EmsIeFupmniKbvKaUww0seG7LdkUn3zZr25MBtZwkt9myEvJ_L5lQTSt77elB0fdx3iCg_BHyZ-RRIK46O6Y1J2Y9fX5Z-i0LogzcuXI-l9dXGVKWF-SoHQGYgkflMqqJXWVzAPehtfxQaPt5loZvZesE3Ldl7BVzzgRxSJJvqBZyTQBfWynTnkplYzGgR93dqE7qpWUhzWDnRBY72tJH5xjuo7QZf70VCO9IKmvHoER98pYz5TG_ed25WBOeK8sw-_FoBdyu0QHgbleDWF9LtBwKdp_s8-bcE7aPQBG1lPqUJCRyCIa3Ce7i3t98lG_7Mj7dwyyPUbeQ_eoi2x-3Nd7noqM2eJC7EWX-tLYUR4-xBVhXPaJqP4aoklHRHhM7QvOo7RckTMY3qJn01MBYViqMYPfs0s8b_FxS-H3dsmzGDIwjO7iD2Yw990zUVwzNzKV0EU%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f557b0e783df474daf17a224ba19289d&_e=xn2hsAReFZsELxcrL7lHHRwt7TNwJN7YePl9EmsIeFupmniKbvKaUww0seG7LdkUn3zZr25MBtZwkt9myEvJ_L5lQTSt77elB0fdx3iCg_BHyZ-RRIK46O6Y1J2Y9fX5Z-i0LogzcuXI-l9dXGVKWF-SoHQGYgkflMqqJXWVzAPehtfxQaPt5loZvZesE3Ldl7BVzzgRxSJJvqBZyTQBfWynTnkplYzGgR93dqE7qpWUhzWDnRBY72tJH5xjuo7QZf70VCO9IKmvHoER98pYz3gsGfaJB09i2sX2SY9enmAjqe7keIrYfMIxmKD0cqpnx4zXdQwCVjr4AZCE_c2yU_b0cH-d0hdPjff0xlWu1qL0sXAICP9LFnoBwsszQuUvEswQLXZHGKA8naghwPjGkpEjTRzvXUKRDVBs08Y5m0N4TFw6kvQpP8SKKvJBlrSHEzoea76r8Xygd56EEo11zwuSTQCfuo2klO4Ob8aA2Cs%3D)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f557b0e783df474daf17a224ba19289d&_e=xn2hsAReFZsELxcrL7lHHRwt7TNwJN7YePl9EmsIeFupmniKbvKaUww0seG7LdkUn3zZr25MBtZwkt9myEvJ_L5lQTSt77elB0fdx3iCg_BHyZ-RRIK46O6Y1J2Y9fX5Z-i0LogzcuXI-l9dXGVKWF-SoHQGYgkflMqqJXWVzAPehtfxQaPt5loZvZesE3Ldl7BVzzgRxSJJvqBZyTQBfWynTnkplYzGgR93dqE7qpWUhzWDnRBY72tJH5xjuo7QZf70VCO9IKmvHoER98pYz94pbQt2Dm3NtESYw7dAi5E-Zm874NN6qIjIClhC0J7EYWaRr2jZVLk7kuyrpaNVwtwX7ekS2Myx4kOPT54RsswOPdPSY0635kGATS4Na5Ic80yEwNSdjcJrNap38tyqUVdg3zR4lKG3yFz0EkRJ2RDFLOEVpT-096Y8avJUCATCX2To3jjYcMArHWMLGvhFTGq8WvZ4lh24FAjh31LRlYo%3D)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f557b0e783df474daf17a224ba19289d&_e=xn2hsAReFZsELxcrL7lHHRwt7TNwJN7YePl9EmsIeFupmniKbvKaUww0seG7LdkUn3zZr25MBtZwkt9myEvJ_L5lQTSt77elB0fdx3iCg_BHyZ-RRIK46O6Y1J2Y9fX5Z-i0LogzcuXI-l9dXGVKWF-SoHQGYgkflMqqJXWVzAPehtfxQaPt5loZvZesE3Ldl7BVzzgRxSJJvqBZyTQBfWynTnkplYzGgR93dqE7qpWUhzWDnRBY72tJH5xjuo7QZf70VCO9IKmvHoER98pYz84E2cysvhO_jPe4nfj6C7BKtbpvxd3P-njBF23zIv461P35Egju9TcF13IF6WH31pyeDElpjzUcrvtCuVYJQwVY8wZawDlXyOiB6aSwV6f2wUBXF9cZ9QrAniFH4-QnquJxQe5yxwO56EX9WJl0-kv0nhYkYJ_VSzSiaKCsMW7Fh27hoIh7w_1v6eRgP4RQGbj2fKeQkPxrn069Q58fSZs%3D)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f557b0e783df474daf17a224ba19289d&_e=xn2hsAReFZsELxcrL7lHHRwt7TNwJN7YePl9EmsIeFupmniKbvKaUww0seG7LdkUn3zZr25MBtZwkt9myEvJ_L5lQTSt77elB0fdx3iCg_BHyZ-RRIK46O6Y1J2Y9fX5Z-i0LogzcuXI-l9dXGVKWF-SoHQGYgkflMqqJXWVzAPehtfxQaPt5loZvZesE3Ldl7BVzzgRxSJJvqBZyTQBfWynTnkplYzGgR93dqE7qpWUhzWDnRBY72tJH5xjuo7QZf70VCO9IKmvHoER98pYz6y3VaLVmUnhRy4DX_0IPndcnzu4K1UBlqO-fF5ST5jx7V_GcKsa4fVIK55c5fuYnGOnJcLvmmEe4z6oNKQ9fLjHvdU2s9sQQ8EJRNEPtrV6v_5fBPs7UhTp-3-OkomWQcC15y-4HIV7xGyHYplzVYh_AkRsxcqAdC21x26l3bcIOYM3EKmsKDDix6gQ3SU9R0LXnzVlAoDnSj4jTeruCV0%3D)
---

Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason **[I’m running for Congress, and today I’m asking if you’ll chip-in $5 or $10 to help me get my campaign off the ground.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f557b0e783df474daf17a224ba19289d&_e=xn2hsAReFZsELxcrL7lHHRwt7TNwJN7YePl9EmsIeFupmniKbvKaUww0seG7LdkUn3zZr25MBtZwkt9myEvJ_L5lQTSt77elB0fdx3iCg_BHyZ-RRIK46O6Y1J2Y9fX5Z-i0LogzcuXI-l9dXGVKWF-SoHQGYgkflMqqJXWVzAPehtfxQaPt5loZvZesE3Ldl7BVzzgRxSJJvqBZyTQBfWynTnkplYzGgR93dqE7qpWUhzWDnRBY72tJH5xjuo7QZf70VCO9IKmvHoER98pYzy2bf6L1K__VWoVvRtvoK4dPhclZUqLVuUQuQ0iMdRSIBcK6IFZAMBcOYALborWS1LzYsFE6pPiomBMKWREg6bJDTqpDQTe3crLlrse0Ja6D81mO0cAtPRgm8XJ3VYNpfrvl66XJX3Paz00EmL7qYpr3-0agc6nOznYSUGoOQM5MbH3kWqEddhJ5PRsFTvJxaqzF0oLUKM59-VYGKiVxi2A%3D) **

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f557b0e783df474daf17a224ba19289d&_e=xn2hsAReFZsELxcrL7lHHRwt7TNwJN7YePl9EmsIeFupmniKbvKaUww0seG7LdkUn3zZr25MBtZwkt9myEvJ_L5lQTSt77elB0fdx3iCg_BHyZ-RRIK46O6Y1J2Y9fX5Z-i0LogzcuXI-l9dXGVKWF-SoHQGYgkflMqqJXWVzAPehtfxQaPt5loZvZesE3Ldl7BVzzgRxSJJvqBZyTQBfWynTnkplYzGgR93dqE7qpWUhzWDnRBY72tJH5xjuo7QZf70VCO9IKmvHoER98pYz79DhAlYqcq6ed_ny9ZZXjHVvSFx6zj4PHXl3DdZ3Kc8UhHvEwSsQilYTOo2tiEeZWjLoTnt_AUeN3I6udqkIlBoCGvr5aOQzFyWEisCRPHElOKAcc5KVK__YGB1eAPAqwnwr-kRu1N58Ii6kJijVXloJNRwljgjqQkNiBCHU6WVwNVH-QMHtBG9_GJySSugp8t1NO_DeizPs5yKuHIH0sU%3D)
At the time of the Benghazi attacks, **Hillary Clinton** knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She **knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable**. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, **purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack** , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally.

**[Hillary Clinton’s deceptions and lies will forever stand to serve as prime examples of everything that is wrong in Washington. I’m running to hold these bureaucrats accountable and I hope you’ll help put some wind in my sails by donating $5, $10 or even $50 today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f557b0e783df474daf17a224ba19289d&_e=xn2hsAReFZsELxcrL7lHHRwt7TNwJN7YePl9EmsIeFupmniKbvKaUww0seG7LdkUn3zZr25MBtZwkt9myEvJ_L5lQTSt77elB0fdx3iCg_BHyZ-RRIK46O6Y1J2Y9fX5Z-i0LogzcuXI-l9dXGVKWF-SoHQGYgkflMqqJXWVzAPehtfxQaPt5loZvZesE3Ldl7BVzzgRxSJJvqBZyTQBfWynTnkplYzGgR93dqE7qpWUhzWDnRBY72tJH5xjuo7QZf70VCO9IKmvHoER98pYzwadRaFo4PzTAPN56faP77JYqoE0XZWySQYzhU5_TWrVRnOLo1vl60MTzBnCg51QfiWcQbg1JdhCc9YdyDpnkP5fhdSMmeW6v6xHa4cZJ0XzZZIprx8ZUd8mr87f3SHT8VrASlh9t1HbQZ1LtTwz87qf0oTGZgrE9d8meathuevlLkMky5desOxezj_lGlFGlbV3LiC96q2hF9FQ5GqGaQ8%3D)**.

[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f557b0e783df474daf17a224ba19289d&_e=xn2hsAReFZsELxcrL7lHHRwt7TNwJN7YePl9EmsIeFupmniKbvKaUww0seG7LdkUn3zZr25MBtZwkt9myEvJ_L5lQTSt77elB0fdx3iCg_BHyZ-RRIK46O6Y1J2Y9fX5Z-i0LogzcuXI-l9dXGVKWF-SoHQGYgkflMqqJXWVzAPehtfxQaPt5loZvZesE3Ldl7BVzzgRxSJJvqBZyTQBfWynTnkplYzGgR93dqE7qpWUhzWDnRBY72tJH5xjuo7QZf70VCO9IKmvHoER98pYzyMbzQfAWK0EvYpmng-LpXz9Hl0BcD1A1M6HZmcUeP-CQ5r8iaWf7zONHkD7MFF9fxjBA-vC6KMlFVyrVW0tqp5pgZqnNlDwmHEddpVzdzsUUR4uyd10XcsW1edblzbUd2aynRNpbbfqhMsWe7tbbmAkAV7BoXhG-bQcqg9AMAZrDFa6S0pn6o5_EnM40gwS_-lSHMTAwLNA82EJrR1WRDg%3D)

In service
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f557b0e783df474daf17a224ba19289d&_e=xn2hsAReFZsELxcrL7lHHRwt7TNwJN7YePl9EmsIeFupmniKbvKaUww0seG7LdkUn3zZr25MBtZwkt9myEvJ_L5lQTSt77elB0fdx3iCg_BHyZ-RRIK46O6Y1J2Y9fX5Z-i0LogzcuXI-l9dXGVKWF-SoHQGYgkflMqqJXWVzAPehtfxQaPt5loZvZesE3Ldl7BVzzgRxSJJvqBZyTQBfWynTnkplYzGgR93dqE7qpWUhzWDnRBY72tJH5xjuo7QZf70VCO9IKmvHoER98pYz4ZGSTNtZr6KrEPldV4DI2uFonornZOO67ZX2U1CEZsgWu-yiEa-T3JyNwecxFk6h8VYHTNaZtEWakqdj0ZPlr5ixLIeUycfKdy0jmIzIFlyjsYXWGwhMFOFzMzPUUtnW8zLi_0H4kqFvFf5otrmZQDkZ7cGh6R4DGmviOz87cx0XIZ1ddQ86J6oIrcieCynjYzqgUKnpYdVx1hpFSkGdIo%3D)**

| President Trump and the America First movement are so powerful - and so threatening to the elite - that the Swamp and the national security apparatus are turning against their own citizens and a duly-elected president.

name: Team Martin
subject: Why our campaign operates a little differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
As one of Dr. Martin’s supporters, you know that his experience on the front lines of the COVID-19 pandemic is one of the many qualities that makes him the right choice to lead Tennessee forward. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35891439/306472501/-1314262958?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210914response_JM_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmZiOGQ2Ni0yNjE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ds7-X7hUNPJMh01XIcO1ZVFcMmqtXLWwQAf5rS3jcvk=)
---
Hey Peter, As one of Dr. Martin’s supporters, you know that his experience on the front lines of the COVID-19 pandemic is one of the many qualities that makes him the right choice to lead Tennessee forward. This is a man who spent _weeks_ isolated away from his family while he continued to serve the Tenneesseans who needed him most in the hospital. It’s sacrifices like that — unimaginable for most of us — that show his character and commitment to public service. **And with the pandemic still raging in our state, thanks to Gov. Lee’s incompetence and denial, Dr. Martin is still working around the clock treating Tennesseans with COVID-19 (and when he’s not in the hospital, he’s out meeting people in the community).** Unfortunately, this means that Dr. Martin has far less time to make traditional campaign calls and events than most candidates — [_**so we’re asking grassroots supporters like you to step up and fill in the gaps. Can you contribute to Dr. Martin’s campaign to bring real leadership back to Tennessee?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35891440/306472502/-123621691?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210916midmonth_TM_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmZiOGQ2Ni0yNjE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ds7-X7hUNPJMh01XIcO1ZVFcMmqtXLWwQAf5rS3jcvk=) | [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35891441/306472503/-1314262958?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210916midmonth_TM_all_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmZiOGQ2Ni0yNjE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ds7-X7hUNPJMh01XIcO1ZVFcMmqtXLWwQAf5rS3jcvk=)
---
Campaigns like ours have to operate a little differently to be able to raise the cash needed to compete against the Republican dark money machine. Normally, we’d rely on a combination of grassroots support (that’s you!) and “call time,” which is where a candidate calls through a list of reliable Democratic donors and asks them to contribute.
But because Dr. Martin is splitting his time between treating COVID-19 patients at the hospital and meeting everyday Tennesseans out in the communities, he simply doesn’t have the time to make the number of calls needed to close the gap between us and our opponent.
[_**So we’re turning to our grassroots supporters to help us close that gap: Can you pitch in $5 or $10 to fuel this campaign for ALL Tennesseans? At this juncture in the race, even a small amount goes a long way.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35891442/306472504/-123621691?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210916midmonth_TM_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmZiOGQ2Ni0yNjE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ds7-X7hUNPJMh01XIcO1ZVFcMmqtXLWwQAf5rS3jcvk=)
**[__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35891443/306472505/-123621691?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210916midmonth_TM_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmZiOGQ2Ni0yNjE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ds7-X7hUNPJMh01XIcO1ZVFcMmqtXLWwQAf5rS3jcvk=)**

name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: No door should ever be closed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
This little girl was taught by her mom that no door should ever be closed to her.
#

This little girl was taught by her mom that no door should ever be closed to her. With hard work and faith, she could accomplish anything.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35891697/306473453/1741212721?refcode2=03ad775a-2717-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210916-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2FkNzc1YS0yNzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PIuc1xt1F33pZKaHouWwiS0abE9UeEvUuE_0ub0KyZQ=)
That little girl took these lessons to heart, and she dedicated her life to fighting for justice for the people of North Carolina.
She blazed a trail in public service. She went from public defender to judge — becoming the first African American woman to ever win a statewide election in North Carolina without first being appointed.
That little girl grew up to be the first African American woman to ever serve as Chief Justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court.
That little girl is Cheri Beasley, and now she is running for the United States Senate to open doors of opportunity for all of our families.
[**Make a $3 donation today to elect Cheri Beasley to fight for justice for all of us. name: Rand Paul
subject: This is how we end Biden’s Presidency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gibbons for Ohio
body:
I desperately need more allies in the U.S. Senate willing to join my fight to END all lockdowns
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zg5ivj2rb9ap1bgqdek6g8n7p7a039ke4ipami5g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3h60or2cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmclhn2db0s5pjasdh63j31ob2m4q69c3lekojed31e2qbeclgm2p7bc5mm2pnfduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75cb66pgb6o37m9p6cc9gm9h3csh5u)

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9mq72g8c5fna1546ihjqrgs7m5eh694kpp6f0oo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3h60or2cdh2bs)

Friend,

I desperately need more allies in the U.S. Senate willing to join my fight to END all lockdowns, fire Anthony Fauci and the Mask Mafia, and to drain the swamp.

I am FULLY endorsing my friend Mike Gibbons for Senate in Ohio. He is an America-First champion, constitutional conservative, and is ready to fight side by side with me in the Senate and restore our Republic!

I believe we can end Joe Biden's Presidency by electing Mike Gibbons to the Senate. Here's how:
* By electing a conservative majority in the U.S. Senate, democrats can't pass insane **$3.5 TRILLION** spending bills.

* Mike Gibbons is fully committed to ending the Mask Mafia, lockdowns, and helping me **TERMINATE Anthony Fauci 's job. **

* Once Mike Gibbons is elected to the U.S. Senate, he can help me hold the Biden administration accountable for their **FAILURES in Afghanistan.**

The open Ohio Senate seat is Biden's path to victory during the midterm elections. Biden, Pelosi, and Schumer are salivating over winning this seat... _Let 's elect Mike Gibbons to the U.S. Senate and end Biden's career in Washington_!

[**Please join me and support Mike Gibbons with a donation of $20.22, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount today:**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpe9qmumqmv99be28im1mp63germ5gec48qe2p6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3h60or2cdh2bs)

**[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0r4k8aei0jg37i2hmjmqke8rikj240a8g3llij8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3h60or2cdh2bs)**

Mike Gibbons is a successful businessman, man of faith, and a family man.

Do you know what I like most about, Mike?

He started his career pouring cement and working on a factory floor. He didn't start his own business until he was 37. Mike is proof the American Dream is possible for anyone!

I am endorsing Mike Gibbons because I believe he is a hardcore conservative who will fight for the Constitution and make us proud.

[**Friend, I am personally asking you to answer this call-to-action by rushing a donation of $20.22, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to Mike Gibbons 's campaign today. **](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zeliro4fgs1gk5kosbs2101e1bm1gqm69gd1e780_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3h60or2cdh2bs)

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z92ecvbslbep1mmetf2070al0rt0teoarvf7al18_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3h60or2cdh2bs)

I am counting on your help to raise $10,000 in the next 48 hours for Mike.

You and I can WIN in 2022 and end Biden's Presidency... but I need your help.

[**Please support Mike Gibbons 's campaign by clicking here.**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zk7chnm7cvf1pi2q3fvvfndhtv2gahhsaq31ogsg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c3h60or2cdh2bs)

Thank you,

Senator Rand Paul

Paid for by Gibbons for Ohio

| | Hi Peter,

As if it's not enough that Biden and his godless commies are destroying the country with his traitorous acts, he also insists on dishonoring us at every turn.

It's time to #FIREBIDEN!

As an Afghanistan vet, 9/11 means a lot to me. It's somber time, and respect and solemnity are what is demanded by our leaders.

_Apparently, no one told Biden._

_Once again, Joe Biden showed just how disrespectful he is off the victims of 9/11, their families and friends. Sometime during the ceremony, Biden was photographed pulling down his mask and yelling at someone as the ceremony was taking place. Who Biden was yelling at and what he was yelling is still a big mystery and will probably be kept hidden by the corrupt media.

Of course, mush mouth Biden couldn’t be bothered to give a live speech either, becoming the first president since 9/11 happened no to do so. Even Obama looks stunned. _

That's right.

Tiiiiiiiiiiiiiiimber. It is TIME to FIRE BIDEN.

He's just some old clown with an anger problem.

It's time to end this nightmare.

body:
President Biden campaigned on the slogan “Truth Over Lies.” Now we’re being lied to left and right. [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=10798b0ec1644755a240e6f1a9bc5aa9&_e=mFr8oq6Zc-ZZDVT5xgewG0ZZgvcKLIcEScpKx1sVEeB-c_f5elhXIXX3L3DAC9GQOVutFrQS-fehSG-VbcNpqeqvs-lWc7Ma6kGlPdJcHsW2DfeKo4YS1xW0M6mRa6Bv_WYq_op7Vc9i9EqWsfA-yd_OtFaRp8nEpRHMwIX9ymBv4e1_RxmmyNDwnBIRqcp3NLj6FSMKz79kWYVJKi2w_pNrW6SiX-eJpOCwFRC2EEuSM4wjgjBK4cZcItRXzgvd9O2I-gwAV58i3n3us9b_bSJ4_diLyP9sA-X7gbmJEYBqlahvjckbxIgnXx9mZDnL8tCSteovgS9nCsw9M7BGQ8LGRYpsEdVkspvioAwQMwSVHo0V817DhKYrceBjwRmdQUvUt5yaiyYPex1zSHSDAgQVAnXuFXbjm8fn9B8DJYzeWAuC9c7tW9rucc2NV0AfcXs9qTUhSkck4DXHbNL6hqKPlWiu2raCSvvsNB-GDnQ%3D) Friend, President Biden campaigned on the slogan _“Truth Over Lies”_ last year. **Unfortunately for Biden, Fauci, Psaki, and the rest of the administration, Mike is determined to hold them accountable.**_[**Don’t let them off the hook >>>**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=10798b0ec1644755a240e6f1a9bc5aa9&_e=mFr8oq6Zc-ZZDVT5xgewG0ZZgvcKLIcEScpKx1sVEeB-c_f5elhXIXX3L3DAC9GQOVutFrQS-fehSG-VbcNpqeqvs-lWc7Ma6kGlPdJcHsW2DfeKo4YS1xW0M6mRa6Bv_WYq_op7Vc9i9EqWsfA-yd_OtFaRp8nEpRHMwIX9ymBv4e1_RxmmyNDwnBIRqcp3NLj6FSMKz79kWYVJKi2w_pNrW6SiX-eJpOCwFRC2EEuSM4wjgjBK4cZcItRXzgvdDrZlFfM9sqpztRZadNJDm_eKzF30jd1wQPoX65-J3ss0KNAKj1mWFx_o9IK8qFbloEArRmAdn0UX0kMBVJNTWhzigqxAaDhjs2bBUg61GfRgIpL2iehxcnzbF7UjDrHXRIT2OtexzAOLHs4CyYCCYw6TZBqSu1SLa_eEnhnxpYchHhvmSgL7ru51yFcjkQVK9T0csa5V53y2_M9AbUTADQhJ0lY4ItF0d_yNOvelJ2w%3D)_ [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=10798b0ec1644755a240e6f1a9bc5aa9&_e=mFr8oq6Zc-ZZDVT5xgewG0ZZgvcKLIcEScpKx1sVEeB-c_f5elhXIXX3L3DAC9GQOVutFrQS-fehSG-VbcNpqeqvs-lWc7Ma6kGlPdJcHsW2DfeKo4YS1xW0M6mRa6Bv_WYq_op7Vc9i9EqWsfA-yd_OtFaRp8nEpRHMwIX9ymBv4e1_RxmmyNDwnBIRqcp3NLj6FSMKz79kWYVJKi2w_pNrW6SiX-eJpOCwFRC2EEuSM4wjgjBK4cZcItRXzgvdMNAykbAs231hhB2EbNvhZUKYyNUhMG_8C34IxNtoRyzphLq80vLLUmOOZoWiFHNwz_QOVXYA-i8SOXTBPR2t3wcie1tNoQ16L63qy4bg0RRvH3nkFMFNhJFD5jwDkzr0NRAu0iu3NNm252IVoJZNW4CLNJsU8efjwhZp7Ft_p7U6bE_Olg0teWqn9D_bNy9kM48-OHfUYeTnbtlt4n4PGxft8MhWpHor_eNx_XIYj2Y%3D) Mike isn’t backing down while Democratic leaders retreat and mislead. With your support, we will take back Congress and get some truth back in Washington.**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=10798b0ec1644755a240e6f1a9bc5aa9&_e=mFr8oq6Zc-ZZDVT5xgewG0ZZgvcKLIcEScpKx1sVEeB-c_f5elhXIXX3L3DAC9GQOVutFrQS-fehSG-VbcNpqeqvs-lWc7Ma6kGlPdJcHsW2DfeKo4YS1xW0M6mRa6Bv_WYq_op7Vc9i9EqWsfA-yd_OtFaRp8nEpRHMwIX9ymBv4e1_RxmmyNDwnBIRqcp3NLj6FSMKz79kWYVJKi2w_pNrW6SiX-eJpOCwFRC2EEuSM4wjgjBK4cZcItRXzgvdrNR_aKC67gvHNxX83cRTufzywQ1Agi6ByW5LTJRf7h0aiTPCthkPTXuD_6HUVDTwEncS9RxYND3AIeB8unkXDXl3mIOzPRaU0VlQ4samU-hm1jsTbzuX9X7c1RXt6-rb5rV0Nes2j_P1P22Ftvmq6wgaUPh_BTO5npUsHd_jNE-jN_V7RsJi4BGwLYN8yZllYDqx3r3ozI-eW1gb7XMP3G3zLGuBB9OHnqVu5mBTAyM%3D)_ Thank you, Patrick McNulty |

And frankly, I your help, Peter. | | | | | | To be clear, I’m going to be relying on your help to defend President Trump’s America First agenda from Joe Biden’s Democrats. But I can promise that I’ll never ask you to do more than I’m willing to do myself. And no one will fight harder for you than I will. Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: If we lose Nevada, we will lose the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGnWiHv_Q3cC38BWLeox8IDoCxyx31xv81CDC-L_PJjBWahBpF3THASAFNociMFvh7DDzdzKF2XoqCLtBr1qZvFE6pFVmTDQmqPBFEQCwH9FRM9nWsMUJLlT9Vd8a4khMA6_4iB4Bb6q9P9WwVFJ6OgxSg4pG2d62vq3EtqVkeE9D3Llls56zWWE4CmKttaq-tU2dlvdtlJgFOhL1KDfBxZKRdhoqUxyETGTZJUunofeWtQ7dLkohaHXSVHez0ce1IT8A5mdjpCKatbUcYMrXQX1VzljbrjwGr6LCjVFkLUNYTcvJAox6Jhoz_90A7K86RglRONoHsbJ_QQjKmtUxyDk/3fd/JcC_SONrRpKU2X4qHKYdaA/h0/GD1SbsgbLdD0etvYcSAcRqNTMb98pWO_UpcoQ_ttOCc) Derek, in a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign and Common Good VA to protect our Democratic Senate majority, but I want to explain why your donation is _so critical_ at this moment.

Just hours after my Trump-endorsed opponent launched his campaign against me, CNN tipped control of the Senate towards Republicans. If I lose this race, Democrats will lose our razor-thin Senate majority and our chance to protect choice, make progress on voting rights or advance our other shared values.

**Here’s the thing, Derek, The Cook Political Report just _downgraded_ my chances of winning, after I was already named one of the _most vulnerable_ senators in the entire country by CNN. That was all before Donald Trump threw his “complete and total endorsement” behind my extremist opponent — one of his top allies who pushed voter fraud conspiracy theories to overturn the results of Nevada's election.**

Even worse, more than $1 million has already been spent on attack ads to defeat me — and the recent downgrade for my odds of winning prove that the GOP’s tactics could be working. **Derek, the Republican Senate campaign arm just raised a staggering $28 million.**

**[That’s millions they could pour into Nevada at any moment to defeat me and flip the Senate. Common Good VA said I should reach out right away before my midnight fundraising deadline -- so I’m asking you to donate $25 right now. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGnWiHv_Q3cC38BWLeox8IDpS_9WifemmoCxYDia_PN0VqtAN7CfoLm8_dUPRItBQVIIij9Zmy2Vs4-3tTzXvbFJ73GlSvxa5Fny2_9ApJVO2o_OaQJpUMLZ4LVMWIMjnP6bhvOVkrTmltZWoebIC6qEg8dDzjielaCk-u6OKsBruD9Uo4sYCK5EzAZJWDQ1qfJ1yle4Xi9sQtFMPM__xkbsEMv2bmwgvLwm8qu6gcqEkIAtgN5l3rq3BgeeQ2_PHV2WuXmeqR8XbfCZ-uxtK2D3FaASrpEmynZmrrRkdFno8-qIVjja0j8iqPXIuPm-XK3DrslO0UYHwdRF8DoL4HM8/3fd/JcC_SONrRpKU2X4qHKYdaA/h1/8eZks3Urcmr6Gu3Nrnc_bMaHrQVyNkPzqCFJvizUuy4)**

There’s only one seat standing in the way of Mitch McConnell controlling the Senate, and CNN just declared my race as a top pickup opportunity for Republicans — so I cannot afford to miss tonight’s goal. I urgently need your help to defend Nevada’s must-win seat — or we lose the Senate. Right now, I’m falling just short of my $10,000 fundraising goal and Common Good VA said you could help me hit it before tonight’s midnight deadline.

**[Please, Derek, will you rush $25 before midnight? name: Giffords
subject: URGENT: Donate before Saturday’s right-wing rally
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Guns have no role in our democratic process.
#

**This Saturday, right-wing extremists are gathering for a rally in Washington, DC in support of the rioters convicted of storming our Capitol on January 6th.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210916-1-15&t=1&refcode2=864_3935704_d3wlin&akid=864%2E3935704%2Ed3wlin)
No matter what happens on Saturday, the threat of extremism is very real. We know that domestic terrorists are plotting together online, spreading conspiracy theories, and building arsenals. In the past few weeks, we’ve seen one man make bomb threats in front of the Supreme Court, and another casing the DNC with a machete and bayonet.
**We must not dismiss extremism, because when it’s armed, it can have deadly consequences. We must take extremism seriously and close loopholes in our gun laws to keep firearms out of the hands of people who shouldn’t have them.**
[**If you agree, rush a contribution to Giffords before the right-wing rally starts on Saturday. Let’s show everyone watching that Americans want Congress to ACT to prevent more violent extremism and keep guns out of the hands of domestic terrorists. Quickly, rush your contribution here:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210916-1-15&t=2&refcode2=864_3935704_d3wlin&akid=864%2E3935704%2Ed3wlin)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210916-1-15&t=21&refcode2=864_3935704_d3wlin&akid=864%2E3935704%2Ed3wlin)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210916-1-15&t=22&refcode2=864_3935704_d3wlin&akid=864%2E3935704%2Ed3wlin)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210916-1-15&t=23&refcode2=864_3935704_d3wlin&akid=864%2E3935704%2Ed3wlin)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210916-1-15&t=24&refcode2=864_3935704_d3wlin&akid=864%2E3935704%2Ed3wlin)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210916-1-15&t=25&refcode2=864_3935704_d3wlin&akid=864%2E3935704%2Ed3wlin)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210916-1-15&t=26&refcode2=864_3935704_d3wlin&akid=864%2E3935704%2Ed3wlin)**
---
****
While our democracy thankfully withstood the attack on January 6th, very real threats to it and the potential for violence remain.
Voter intimidation. Threats to election officials. Brandishing weapons in state capitals. Attacking police at the U.S. Capitol... Violent extremism is a growing threat to our democracy, and it’s on Congress to disarm it.
[**Our team at Giffords will be working round the clock to make sure policymakers heed this warning and take action to keep Americans — and our democracy — safe. Thank you for supporting our work with a donation if you can.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210916-1-15&t=27&refcode2=864_3935704_d3wlin&akid=864%2E3935704%2Ed3wlin)
All our best,
The team at Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210916-1-15&t=28&refcode2=864_3935704_d3wlin&akid=864%2E3935704%2Ed3wlin)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=864%2E3935704%2Ed3wlin) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Mike Johnson
subject: Betrayal to law abiding citizens
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
You won’t believe this! Please read... | [ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e238ecd99952462b9e71d8d66ed6d938&_e=sdXe7ASp77ik274Ybj5pXClycbl7ukLXxuRBvncRa2UJtaScLHGEJjlFyFLfbv4RMjjJUkqIWwkZQHEEloyCvyC93eNAMJM7HemIZ-wdPWDgKUi5VWAj1HGz_ST5MGcVGDSZkU8yJFi1DeTR4aBKSx1vwzOe-GiBI1-fxywOh8ObZFXbTIXGamNGEDnG0-NY-ztAU63TiCrSopatjdglkWX3XVPGkxZrN-sz3qe7oGCMEgb0EkWK6HLTRv7EruF_nNx2ubTQAibdeZQ8l3SHUx5T3nxChFDkzs9RdXl2CM93B3TNGivmJVnkn1fs0S-24qUTKwUp7L6tMXb1TH_n4Bjx97jRjxLs1LZIieaTYqHazhPws7_PT3bngOXZ-4nxkAq0uyLnKiIIqnVFeZzo4W4e_r0UTMeXnwZ7xVmuY76IB2upgsXA-thc1NEoXY9677cLLJwBRCAqPiqgrCK2fNRe7LJnmxoeM6xyihUcqE3POFwDGtBLqvlXYeLYwglc6jId09YDSJu8o35btTHOmvNq388FzlnVsZVTDjsw92hokSZ4cePIrMmhBm0_mkxUqQBbBU8woI7n40wD_q-Q0Q%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

We’ve known that Democrats want open borders for a while now, but on Monday, they reached a new low.

Just before midnight, nearly every Democrat on our House Judiciary Committee voted to grant amnesty to nearly ten million illegal aliens - and voted AGAINST my amendment that would have prohibited amnesty at least for those who have TEN or more convictions for Driving Under the Influence of drugs or alcohol!

Yes, you read that correctly. And that’s not all. They also voted Monday night against other Republican amendments to prohibit amnesty eligibility for registered sex offenders and even confirmed violent gang members!

Instead of protecting criminals, maybe the Left should focus on ANY of the other crises they’ve created with their disastrous policies:
* Skyrocketing inflation
* Open borders
* Unlawful mandates
* Afghanistan disaster
* Rising crime rates

Today, Democrats are destroying the American Dream by putting illegal immigrants first and American citizens last. It’s time to stop this nonsense! [**Please add your name to my list of patriots who agree.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e238ecd99952462b9e71d8d66ed6d938&_e=sdXe7ASp77ik274Ybj5pXClycbl7ukLXxuRBvncRa2UJtaScLHGEJjlFyFLfbv4RMjjJUkqIWwkZQHEEloyCvyC93eNAMJM7HemIZ-wdPWDgKUi5VWAj1HGz_ST5MGcVGDSZkU8yJFi1DeTR4aBKSx1vwzOe-GiBI1-fxywOh8ObZFXbTIXGamNGEDnG0-NY-ztAU63TiCrSopatjdglkWX3XVPGkxZrN-sz3qe7oGCMEgb0EkWK6HLTRv7EruF_nNx2ubTQAibdeZQ8l3SHUx5T3nxChFDkzs9RdXl2CM93B3TNGivmJVnkn1fs0S-24qUTKwUp7L6tMXb1TH_n4Bjx97jRjxLs1LZIieaTYqHazhPws7_PT3bngOXZ-4nxnL34U9DoKS5GA0iGhc6JemxO5AEiQ_arxAjlBqJLiMf2HNnMkZzun8tkBvyydVTbtsqeGiTDbhwflQUXzXiynTdi3MzrgS1ypGDMfY8nCTJFBALSaxKrI6i60q2wq8CclHWssGFrFhD2Xo41f-uCRbL00BeR-6IGgH4vZNHHkMxefFtwpy-FDPxRYmKalWP2FA6YwcVem5pv6nrAWlQf4A%3D%3D)

They also voted Monday night against other Republican amendments to prohibit amnesty eligibility for registered sex offenders and even confirmed violent gang members! name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Something feels very wrong, doesn’t it?
body:
| |
---
What is going on?

Every available medicine (and even some supplements!) that is used successfully to treat Covid patients is being blocked in some form or another.
* Major media and government propaganda campaign against HCQ last year.
* Major media and government propaganda campaign against Ivermectin this year.
* Major medical associations and boards are threatening to revoke doctors’ medical licenses if they prescribe medicines like Ivermectin and HCQ.
* Amazon won’t sell, and now PayPal won’t allow you to pay for certain supplements that are shown to help.
* The Biden administration has taken over the approval and distribution of the very successful monoclonal antibody treatment from the states to “promote optimal and **_equitable_** use of the available supply of monoclonal antibodies.” So, the federal government is now restricting and regulating all orders of these treatments.[1](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU5LTQwM2Q1ZDEzOTY1MzQzOWVhOTBjMTUzODBlMDQzY2Yy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3AX2Z0bnJlZjE%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9yb3kuaG91c2UuZ292L21lZGlhL3ByZXNzLXJlbGVhc2VzL3JlcC1yb3ktcHJlc3Nlcy1iaWRlbi1hZG1pbmlzdHJhdGlvbi1hbnN3ZXJzLWluY3JlYXNlZC1yZXN0cmljdGlvbnMtbW9ub2Nsb25hbD9taWQ9NDQzMjgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=_nnGrPJnSGcXvj71QabT2A)

[HOST A PROTEST](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU5LTQwM2Q1ZDEzOTY1MzQzOWVhOTBjMTUzODBlMDQzY2Yy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MzI4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=9Scgrb-CMI2ypBJbvpLzKA)
Americans who suffer from severe cases of Covid, or the elderly and vulnerable who need protection and treatment, have died and more _will_ die because of the corruption of the people running the federal government right now. In addition to the corruption is the radical ideology that demands we distribute lifesaving medicine based on equity (the idea that equal outcomes are the most important goal, no matter who you have to kill to get there).

On top of maligning and prohibiting medicines and supplements that are successfully treating Covid patients – including severely ill patients – the government of the United States of America is **_mandating_** we inject ourselves with a substance in order to have the “privilege” of working and putting food on the table for our families??

**This is TYRANNY.**

**And it’s going to stop because you and I will not allow it to continue.**

America needs you. Our freedom needs you. The Americans who will suffer because of the corruption need you. Your children or grandchildren need you.

[**You can help by signing up right now to host a Just Say No protest on Wednesday, September 22nd.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU5LTQwM2Q1ZDEzOTY1MzQzOWVhOTBjMTUzODBlMDQzY2Yy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MzI4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=mlxLd38jqkIOjmbLTLxb4w)****

**I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: It is only going to get harder. We must fight back _now_.**

We need a strong showing of protests across the country, and Tea Party Patriots Action is here to help you organize yours. We have a how-to guide with step-by-step instructions, printable items like signs and flyers, talking points, additional action items, and more. We are also holding multiple conference calls ahead of the 22nd to answer your questions and help you get it done.

**Please sign up today.** The rush into tyranny seems to be gaining speed, going faster and faster. There is no time to lose. Host a Just Say No protest and tell the tyrants NO!

We will not comply!

Jenny Beth Martin
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU5LTQwM2Q1ZDEzOTY1MzQzOWVhOTBjMTUzODBlMDQzY2Yy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlP21pZD00NDMyOCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=tkqttbp7p9mphy2MnW37zg)

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: John’s never been a typical candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
And we’ve got the data to back it up. Let us show you:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210916-2665-header&t=1&akid=2665%2E434096%2Eb0t_Wd)
We know that John has what it takes to win, Peter— **because he's already done it.**
If you don’t believe us, let’s take a walk back in time to 2018, when John ran, won, and became Lt. Governor of Pennsylvania. John's statewide run that year was the *first time ever* in Pennsylvania history that an incumbent Lieutenant Governor was defeated. 😎
Here’s what that victory looked like:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30096?refcode=em20210916-2665&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2665%2E434096%2Eb0t_Wd)
**The facts speak for themselves, Peter. Our guy John will likely be the only candidate to enter this race — Democrat or Republican — to have already won a statewide election in our Commonwealth.**
But it gets even better: In the general election, John and Governor Wolf went on to beat their Republican opponents by 852,000 votes — blowing past the previous record for the highest number of votes ever won as a ticket in a gubernatorial election. Additionally, with Fetterman as his running mate, Governor Wolf gained almost a million more votes than he did when he ran in 2014.
**John has never been your typical candidate for U.S. Senate, but he’s always had what it takes.**
**[Can you donate your very first $5 to our campaign right now? You just saw it for yourself — John is the only candidate that has a record of winning statewide — so every single cent you donate will continue to help our campaign stand apart and elect John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30096?refcode=em20210916-2665&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2665%2E434096%2Eb0t_Wd)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30096?refcode=em20210916-2665&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2665%2E434096%2Eb0t_Wd)**
Thank you so much for being here. We know that John has always had our backs in this campaign for U.S. Senate, and we’re proud to have his, too. We’ve got a tough road ahead, and your support will make it possible to get there!
Team Fetterman
P.S. John’s our absolute best shot at flipping this seat blue in 2022. But making sure we can build a strong, honest, and inclusive campaign for all 67 PA counties that has what it takes to scale up quickly will depend on you, Peter. **[Will you chip in your first-ever $5 donation right now to help grow our campaign to flip this seat blue by electing John in 2022?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30096?refcode=em20210916-2665&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2665%2E434096%2Eb0t_Wd)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210916-2665-footer&t=24&refcode2=2665_434096_b0t_Wd&akid=2665%2E434096%2Eb0t_Wd)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=2665%2E434096%2Eb0t_Wd)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2665%2E434096%2Eb0t_Wd)

| | Dear Friend, _Maggie’s List_ recently endorsed our very own Amanda Makki for Florida’s 13th Congressional District! _Maggie’s List’s_ Florida chairman Carole Jean Jordan stated, “** _Amanda is an outstanding champion for fiscal conservatism, less government, and strong national security,”._** **Amanda Makki is exactly the woman Florida needs to keep our state strong and free!**

| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=f3705697e6&e=c2296cffff)
---
| The far-left is taking every opportunity they can to tear our country apart. **Vaccine mandates, defunding our police, open borders, failed foreign policy, and a flatlining economy are the results of Democrat control in our federal government. ** The left doesn’t care about the well-being of America or its citizens, they only care about keeping themselves in power. **America deserves leaders that put America First!** With your support, Amanda can stand up to the radical left and their Anti-America agenda. **She will refund our police, secure our borders, bring our economy back, and put America back as the leader of the free world!** [**Can Amanda count on your support to stand up to the Radical Left and put America First?**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=3f2aed0438&e=c2296cffff)

| Thank you for the support,

_Amanda Makki_

body:

We've got some bad news, team. We fell short of our mid-month goal last night. We know this doesn't sound like the end of the world, but here's why it matters in a race like ours: in 2016, Maggie Hassan won by only 1,017 votes, and it could be even closer in 2022. News outlets across the country are calling Maggie the most vulnerable Democratic Senator up for reelection. **With top Republicans across the country watching this race like hawks, we can’t miss even a single goal.** Control of the Senate hinges on this seat, and McConnell-linked super PACs are already spending big against us. **[That's why we need your help, friend. name: Patrick Leahy
subject: Simone Biles, McKayla Maroney, Maggie Nichols, and Aly Raisman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leahy for U
body:
They brought incredible courage and clarity yesterday.

| [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.) Friend, Yesterday, I heard four brave young women testify before the Senate Judiciary Committee and the nation. All four were star elite gymnasts who propelled our country to the top of the sport. All four were abused by Larry Nassar, the convicted sex offender and former USA Gymnastics doctor. And all four were failed by the adults to whom they reported their abuse. _For years._ Simone Biles, McKayla Maroney, Maggie Nichols, and Aly Raisman brought incredible courage and clarity yesterday, shining a spotlight on the devastating failures of FBI investigators and so many others who could have stopped the abuse. "To be clear, I blame Larry Nassar," Simone Biles said, "but I also blame an entire system that enabled and perpetrated his abuse." By coming forward years ago and testifying yesterday, these women showed courage and determination to expose Larry Nassar and the system that failed them. Now we must do our job by holding those responsible -- or, more accurately, who failed to meet their responsibilities -- to account. **[Join me in applauding the courage of Ms. Biles, Ms. Maroney, Ms. Nichols, and Ms. Raisman. Let's thank them for their bravery and vow to prevent such institutional failures from happening again. ](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/D_zeSG9Yv7Hz/Mjd1c2F6aGVtUVRtSWljaU5Hczl0RHo2QWlLeGJkU1VXdk5oNDkrbW5jbzZwakpUV2FvTUxBWFFJNFgrd2RsN0ZaeEhEM2lNc2k4K3FGNDJWYjBYdlQ2Wi8yWE8rUDZPczN2S25oOGgyK1k9S0/WTFKK21kTUVTZG9ZNjF6RVlKZGNtOUxGc3JDMFYyMDlROEdaUUxtZ2h4U002MUZsUEE4aFR3bzQxRWNva0p6OUZha2FEZE4waDVvaENORytwRkU0TlhDc1Q2VUovd1h4S0)** Sincerely, Patrick Leahy
U.S. Senator P.S. If you or anyone you know is experiencing sexual abuse, call the National Sexual Assault Hotline at [**800-656-HOPE**](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/9bz8s0N9PpHe/Mjd1c2F6aGVtUVRtSWljaU5Hczl0RHo2QWlLeGJkU1VXdk5oNDkrbW5jbzZwakpUV2FvTUxBWFFJNFgrd2RsN0ZaeEhEM2lNc2k4K3FGNDJWYjBYdlQ2Wi8yWE8rUDZPczN2S25oOGgyK1k9S0/) or **[click here to connect with a trained support specialist.](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/8EwKh~7v9RTa/Mjd1c2F6aGVtUVRtSWljaU5Hczl0RHo2QWlLeGJkU1VXdk5oNDkrbW5jbzZwakpUV2FvTUxBWFFJNFgrd2RsN0ZaeEhEM2lNc2k4K3FGNDJWYjBYdlQ2Wi8yWE8rUDZPczN2S25oOGgyK1k9S0/)** | [SIGN ON»](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/2Wzqc_ke9zJE/Mjd1c2F6aGVtUVRtSWljaU5Hczl0RHo2QWlLeGJkU1VXdk5oNDkrbW5jbzZwakpUV2FvTUxBWFFJNFgrd2RsN0ZaeEhEM2lNc2k4K3FGNDJWYjBYdlQ2Wi8yWE8rUDZPczN2S25oOGgyK1k9S0/WTFKK21kTUVTZG9ZNjF6RVlKZGNtOUxGc3JDMFYyMDlROEdaUUxtZ2h4U002MUZsUEE4aFR3bzQxRWNva0p6OUZha2FEZE4waDVvaENORytwRkU0TlhDc1Q2VUovd1h4S0)

name: John Castorani
subject: The 4 a.m. call Hillary Clinton wouldn't take.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
I answered the 4 a.m. call that former secretary of State Hillary Clinton wouldn't. For six years I hunted the perpetrators of the Benghazi attack. Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_s=e3f552012a2048ebbf25c44feca989d6&_t=8DGy4d03BH_6SimVH_qg_Bsxj3J2YQsX_eMEM3CKqi_91xO3kfiQU--B5rOrXtbcAG4hu6h3jHyePs3ESbEp2WLNGqJWSWFurCEtWjHdeXF40QX9fEC1A0r9AUFtyCWwjH5cO1c2MAVQ0GKM5CRv28bTNSiIYwCVzrBje4KjZ9k%3D) | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e3f552012a2048ebbf25c44feca989d6&_e=1JgP5bZ50p3JjTbid8VL7ftHj-kCVNWQR5oZrqM1toedp6qXZjeP_TKjXdoaJW-TigFsww_RAlGCvXvwrtTPwSopPCjSsqmf_pc1zapfjqN4yzDRIBWD9VM75-xd_23YNE_qJaWq4X5reJlueTTj1vDUF9SPyH5ytfD4j8DJt7f1o56aAgbVzai5r2l1WmRhcU-UaN2jvzBxooQMTkR4_p_fvUNhZA88tKar0IQVByH7LiJPX2QqOTZMRy3-VsdPSfYgl6GE4ms3FncPFY0gt3N3GJM_O_90r2QbKid5rrODjX5An3p8IyCFCvJF4iZ3Li9962ON2DrxQ7KXC5pO4GRlSpFIWk02smnWB33jbmXI6dEd0xR_uEyFIQnSkDTx91rLEiumwCmIu_5vLdjyYsZsp-fMSLgkkAkzT0domEZBjycojLM6uxNw3FPbnpplROCdG7XNmdP38Y-KqKWYroYQdTDCXlIxLE5Pxgj41vU%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e3f552012a2048ebbf25c44feca989d6&_e=1JgP5bZ50p3JjTbid8VL7ftHj-kCVNWQR5oZrqM1toedp6qXZjeP_TKjXdoaJW-TigFsww_RAlGCvXvwrtTPwSopPCjSsqmf_pc1zapfjqN4yzDRIBWD9VM75-xd_23YNE_qJaWq4X5reJlueTTj1vDUF9SPyH5ytfD4j8DJt7f1o56aAgbVzai5r2l1WmRhcU-UaN2jvzBxooQMTkR4_p_fvUNhZA88tKar0IQVByH7LiJPX2QqOTZMRy3-VsdPSfYgl6GE4ms3FncPFY0gt1p7PrYDksqG0r1ydZPDRoXP-RF6kkgTh775uGP6h8cfLaBreElY4tmYnQPSOtUCFsgLc4eEQSRdC3fDrfjjN7zP6h2yDvpzXYw6zrvVVJuV7dnfbpckwS6v4dPb38epEm3R5Y-mMFwuMWZqrW4_O8TrlAt6gHXOSeb0ot68erpnYQDz3HakL1Ti_NzmzDJ1N5UPg5UvWQyWinTn1JQFPGE%3D)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e3f552012a2048ebbf25c44feca989d6&_e=1JgP5bZ50p3JjTbid8VL7ftHj-kCVNWQR5oZrqM1toedp6qXZjeP_TKjXdoaJW-TigFsww_RAlGCvXvwrtTPwSopPCjSsqmf_pc1zapfjqN4yzDRIBWD9VM75-xd_23YNE_qJaWq4X5reJlueTTj1vDUF9SPyH5ytfD4j8DJt7f1o56aAgbVzai5r2l1WmRhcU-UaN2jvzBxooQMTkR4_p_fvUNhZA88tKar0IQVByH7LiJPX2QqOTZMRy3-VsdPSfYgl6GE4ms3FncPFY0gt5GrHWUTKr5qJpdObbcgHCDc8EC_J7WRnFXTlOzzdCjBuTzesmDVVYBsIuC5wvkjBr3auXEMh-D_rZkUHXFuu8icjKbR-agnNSyzMsbt83C4UFcarv6ft1YAd2D3kCrWhRCWL0w80M2nywFiaTL5Boo_1d9ZmatOnJrbY5pNQAd1y-HbqMiR9Lt2SrylqNR-MlRqxlCBWkYIVf34BrVNHBA%3D)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e3f552012a2048ebbf25c44feca989d6&_e=1JgP5bZ50p3JjTbid8VL7ftHj-kCVNWQR5oZrqM1toedp6qXZjeP_TKjXdoaJW-TigFsww_RAlGCvXvwrtTPwSopPCjSsqmf_pc1zapfjqN4yzDRIBWD9VM75-xd_23YNE_qJaWq4X5reJlueTTj1vDUF9SPyH5ytfD4j8DJt7f1o56aAgbVzai5r2l1WmRhcU-UaN2jvzBxooQMTkR4_p_fvUNhZA88tKar0IQVByH7LiJPX2QqOTZMRy3-VsdPSfYgl6GE4ms3FncPFY0gt89ZpAjfQymYebd-J4-d5DNgI0KauSCa_okiI4JgW5LvZnQLPDu4B-_AM73DmobGGJ2_-GgFScNSJAiKcKNm-vpGQoso5NQMUmn0jk-mMnu2cgRuAY_BkaPX84wK2vk2QwQv65ZB781wTdiF1KPC15JTArrMxPszUoIEsfTjvyI9pJvPE-Kkr86h_9MtHezjOZRjh_bpZh0AS6DtfPWnD5I%3D)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_

Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason **[I’m running for Congress, and today I’m asking if you’ll chip-in $5 or $10 to help me get my campaign off the ground.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e3f552012a2048ebbf25c44feca989d6&_e=1JgP5bZ50p3JjTbid8VL7ftHj-kCVNWQR5oZrqM1toedp6qXZjeP_TKjXdoaJW-TigFsww_RAlGCvXvwrtTPwSopPCjSsqmf_pc1zapfjqN4yzDRIBWD9VM75-xd_23YNE_qJaWq4X5reJlueTTj1vDUF9SPyH5ytfD4j8DJt7f1o56aAgbVzai5r2l1WmRhcU-UaN2jvzBxooQMTkR4_p_fvUNhZA88tKar0IQVByH7LiJPX2QqOTZMRy3-VsdPSfYgl6GE4ms3FncPFY0gt-9XPWH0eZPCNZ6wgKLQC133r2VwpBSr8hfn8uO-20wClXYj5qXzwh4lOUhxkbdCK9_fYJiDeatiNGyK1a_bgspbPQ7Z3cTw8AxQscT3FuYDofXsSG5O7KlNr_6LsQ9quXJH0CfMPrwuT4CqPh3kwPynajwigFBVsqy-VNXBrzvwwXLRGIdYK2VXOdq62jVBzVnRm2Y_Wd-vFTn5JYCSNFM%3D) **

At the time of the Benghazi attacks, **Hillary Clinton** knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She **knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable**. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, **purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack** , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally.

**[Hillary Clinton’s deceptions and lies will forever stand to serve as prime examples of everything that is wrong in Washington. I’m running to hold these bureaucrats accountable and I hope you’ll help put some wind in my sails by donating $5, $10 or even $50 today](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e3f552012a2048ebbf25c44feca989d6&_e=1JgP5bZ50p3JjTbid8VL7ftHj-kCVNWQR5oZrqM1toedp6qXZjeP_TKjXdoaJW-TigFsww_RAlGCvXvwrtTPwSopPCjSsqmf_pc1zapfjqN4yzDRIBWD9VM75-xd_23YNE_qJaWq4X5reJlueTTj1vDUF9SPyH5ytfD4j8DJt7f1o56aAgbVzai5r2l1WmRhcU-UaN2jvzBxooQMTkR4_p_fvUNhZA88tKar0IQVByH7LiJPX2QqOTZMRy3-VsdPSfYgl6GE4ms3FncPFY0gtw0rf3xf2wqVTFtiaTb9SB5plM1lWFUXglme0iXDgJoB0kRuK_EbjpArLMQnB2ntuXscaf7_Hl5ok3n4FReZwvPjD8V_VKpfi_C1qUawWEFq7hNEmZHBLDi7CQZZAUFegxs_2QDNf6VCXfyRDN7-TupJ3lGWAXJKrvJxtwDm8LwK9VEeQsGrekQdYv4giQtxkXy2z9yOg8EhnFmkIzxkndw%3D)**.

clean_body: I answered the 4 a.m. call that former secretary of State Hillary Clinton wouldn't. For six years I hunted the perpetrators of the Benghazi attack. Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow Conservative, My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today. I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own. Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency . I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price. If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable , and in a moment, You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel. This political assassination made my blood boil. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. name: John Stossel
subject: How you and I can overthrow the fake news media
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Center for Independent Thought
body:
I have watched the mainstream media transform into a merchant of half-truths [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8772%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=UremK27NteA9ux6ldTOjGQ&sysid=1)

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04555%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BDFwxQlI1aemXjV%2fkRNW1w&sysid=1)

Friend,

I have watched the mainstream media transform into a merchant of half-truths, woke propaganda, and a non-stop push for bigger government. **I need your help to push back.**

**_I left my ABC News job because they resisted my attempts to report on unintended consequences of big government programs_**. They wouldn’t let me explain how free market capitalism was saving lives and lifting billions out of poverty.

Fox News let me, but after 7 years, I gave up my show on FBN because I wanted to reach younger people, people who haven’t already made up their minds.

That is why I created **Stossel TV and partnered with Center for Independent Thought.**

Stossel TV has produced more than 400 videos explaining the benefits of free markets and the harm done by big government. Thanks to social media, we don’t need TV networks anymore. Young people don't watch Fox or CNN. They surf the web and get their news from Facebook, YouTube, Instagram, Twitter, etc.

A surprise benefit of posting video on the internet is that our videos keep finding new viewers. We’ve gotten more than 450 million views.

[**You can help Stossel TV reach millions of people by making a donation today. Please click here or one of the links below to donate >>>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04556%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BhMgfdXz69FCLlnMgHbgWw&sysid=1)

[**Donate $20.22 >>>**
**Donate $50 >>>**
**Donate $100 >>>**
**Donate $250 >>>**
**Donate $500 >>>**
**Donate $1,000 >>>**
**Donate $5,000 >>>**
**Donate ANY Amount >>>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04557%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o30e0rSBBlRHjXWOXXVn8w&sysid=1)

My reporting is different from most news on cable and the networks. Most of that is “Donald Trump said today ... !” “Congress just passed ... “ “Biden will promise ... “ At a time when media is polarizing and politicized, Stossel TV maintains journalistic integrity by covering topics such as Socialism vs. Capitalism, Anti-racist Racists, and Social Media Censorship. We challenge the alarmism that demands more regulations.

These topics remain important year after year, election cycle after election cycle, and that’s why our videos keep finding new viewers.

This allows more people to keep learning the truth--years after the video was first released.

**Stossel TV’s rapidly growing views demonstrate people want to hear the facts and think for themselves--despite mainstream media’s pro-government, anti-business bias.**

[**Please help me spread our message of free markets, civil liberties, and individualism by making a donation today >>>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04558%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wO8hPmQTBbIF4waR2PXLyw&sysid=1)

[**Donate $20.22 >>>**
**Donate $50 >>>**
**Donate $100 >>>**
**Donate $250 >>>**
**Donate $500 >>>**
**Donate $1,000 >>>**
**Donate $5,000 >>>**
**Donate ANY Amount >>>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04557%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o30e0rSBBlRHjXWOXXVn8w&sysid=1)

Your donation will help me produce more videos, reach more viewers, and expose the truth about the corrupt media, government, and political elites.

[**Please click here to make a donation.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04559%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vfpsXBqXz0Vh%2bDIZcXEbDQ&sysid=1)

Thank you, Friend.

In liberty,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04555%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BDFwxQlI1aemXjV%2fkRNW1w&sysid=1)
John Stossel
Journalist - _Stossel TV_
Center for Independent Thought

clean_body: | = Friend, Last month, we launched this campaign with a statewide tour, talking and listening to people all over Pennsylvania about the issues that matter most to them and their families. 9 days, 15 counties, 1,168 miles, too many conversations to count. If you didn't get a chance to meet us on the road, we made a recap video so you can see what we're talking about with voters in Pennsylvania. Click below to check it out. | = = = = One thing I hear everywhere I go is that people believe our democracy is in crisis. I agree. And we won't save it with tweets and slogans. We'll do it by going everywhere, talking and listening to everyone, fighting for every vote. And friend, we know how to do that. We know how to put in the hard work and win tough elections. We've done it before, and I'm counting on you to help us do it again. = = Thanks so much for your support, friend. \-- Conor Lamb *
