Mo Brooks – Alabama Senate: Donald Trump endorsed Mo Brooks because he is a fighter who has a proven track record of standing up to the Establishment. Alabama may be a red state, but , and not some weak-kneed moderate Republican. Ted Budd – North Carolina Senate: Donald Trump endorsed Ted Budd because he knows if we’re going to take back the Senate, Congressman Ted Budd has demonstrated his courage, commitment, and conservatism time and time again. Max Miller – Ohio: Max Miller is a fighter. Just look at his resume: He’s a Marine, a senior advisor to President Trump, and he’s challenging a RINO Republican who voted to impeach Donald Trump. With that kind of backbone, Supporting these three candidates will make sure Republicans take back the House and the Senate, but it will do something bigger... ...Your support will make sure authentic conservative fighters go to Washington. And that is exactly what this country needs right now. Best, David McIntosh President, Club for Growth Action Government mandated disclaimers (Club for Growth Action) Club for Growth Action is an independent expenditure committee established by the Club for Growth. We want you to become a member of the Club for Growth, the leading free-enterprise advocacy group in the nation. Please join the Club for Growth by contacting the Club for Growth at www.clubforgrowth.org or by making a contribution to Club for Growth Action or to any other federal candidate on a Club for Growth Action hosted Win Red page. By doing so you affirmatively accept membership in the Club for Growth or affirm a prior membership. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. | PAID FOR BY CLUB FOR GROWTH ACTION AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. (202) 955-5500 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

body:
We fully expect the GOP to fight tooth and nail for their five far-right members of Congress here in Austin. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35898555/306499212/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDQ4MjZiNS0zYzE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B3-pawacdd2DQRBG8bhvZ49uZhlOXcwY73gGCBjPUW0=)
We'll be blunt, friend.

We're officially halfway through the month of September, but we’re not yet halfway to our monthly fundraising target.

Since this is our first end-of-quarter deadline, the press will look at our numbers to gauge our momentum. How much we raise will determine our ability to attract grassroots support and determine our ability to run a campaign that can reach hundreds of thousands of voters in our community.

Early organizing is the key to winning, so in order to catch up we took a closer look at where our donations are coming in from. **Based on our math, if just five supporters from your area chip in right now, we'll be back on track to hit our mark.**

[**So what do you say, friend: Will you be one of the supporters from your area Donna needs to close the gap? As I travel across Kansas, one thing I hear consistently is that Laura Kelly NEEDS to go. She’s blocked good, conservative policies passed by our L Friend, As I travel across Kansas, one thing I hear consistently is that Laura Kelly NEEDS to go. She’s blocked good, conservative policies passed by our Legislature... She’s imposed mandates and lockdowns... And she even presided over an all-out disaster at the Department of Labor. On her watch, our state government paid out about $700 MILLION to fraudsters making bogus unemployment claims during the pandemic. Think about that - Laura Kelly has presided over an administration which has now spent $700 MILLION of your hard-earned money on fraud.

clean_body: As I travel across Kansas, one thing I hear consistently is that Laura Kelly NEEDS to go. She’s blocked good, conservative policies passed by our L Friend, As I travel across Kansas, one thing I hear consistently is that Laura Kelly NEEDS to go. She’s blocked good, conservative policies passed by our Legislature... She’s imposed mandates and lockdowns... And she even presided over an all-out disaster at the Department of Labor. On her watch, our state government paid out about $700 MILLION to fraudsters making bogus unemployment claims during the pandemic. Think about that - Laura Kelly has presided over an administration which has now spent $700 MILLION of your hard-earned money on fraud. This is a total failure. And if you agree with me that Kansans deserve better... I need you to help me send Laura Kelly packing. Worst of all, Laura Kelly's administration for months was paying out your hard-earned taxpayer money to fraudsters while REAL Kansans who were sent to the unemployment lines by her lockdowns were struggling to get their benefits. I will be a leader who will protect our families, crack down to prevent fraud, and reverse the damage done by the Kelly administration's incredible waste of our taxpayer dollars. Will you join our team and help us get the job done? Sincerely, Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Fellow Conservative, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

clean_body: When the angry Fascist Black Lives Matter mob came marching toward our home, we did what many of you reading this email VOTE NOW &NDASH; We're looking for 50,000 conservatives to answer this question: Does Trump still lead the Republican Party? | ABOUT THIS EMAIL : PETITION TO PROTECT THE 2ND AMENDMENT WHY THIS MATTERS: Our 2A rights are under attack from the far Left and President Biden ABOUT ME: Mark McCloskey. Candidate for U.S. Senate. Defended my home from FASCIST BLM mob. . KEEP READING BELOW Fellow American, On June 28th and again on July 3rd, 2020 the Second Amendment to the United States Constitution saved the life of not only myself, but my wife’s life. When the angry Fascist Black Lives Matter mob came marching toward our home, we did what many of you reading this email right now would do: we grabbed our guns to protect our home and our lives. Turns out our Founding Fathers were onto something when they decided to prominently place Americans’ rights to keep and bear arms into the Constitution. Typically, the White House won’t acknowledge a petition with less than 100,000 signatures; that’s a lofty goal, but if you and everyone reading this email today signed on , we would quickly reach our goal. The Supreme Court hasn’t banned assault rifles yet, but if President Biden stacks the Supreme Court as Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are urging him to do, it will only be a matter of time. As I witnessed last summer from the front porch of my home, people can have the best intentions in the world, but if you’re in a group of people and one person starts acting out, things can get out of control pretty quickly. Some may say that I’m not the real deal or that I’m trying to ride a viral moment to the Senate. That would be false. My wife Patricia and I have spent a considerable amount of time ensuring a bill in the Missouri legislature– which would prevent state law enforcement officials from enforcing federal laws that would prohibit the manufacture, ownership and use of firearms –passed into law. I will never back down. I may be running for Senate in Missouri, but I’m running to be a senator for all freedom-loving Americans. For America, Mark McCloskey Republican Candidate for United States Senate | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335 Saint Louis, MO 63108 Don't want to receive our emails?

name: Mark Takano
subject: January 6th, repeated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
What we saw and heard was heartbreaking and disturbing.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35899883/306502872/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWNkOTJhYy00MTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gOVltNpMvnvQnlC2onGssreGkikASqgFdo24zltKZBU=)

**Peter, the events of January 6th continue to haunt us.**

But that’s especially true for the Capitol Police who put their lives on the line that day to defend the U.S. Capitol and the lawmakers inside (including myself).

In the days following, multiple Capitol Police members died, **while the MAGA Republicans on the other side of the aisle _pretended nothing even happened._**

Just last month however, we heard harrowing testimony from some of the Capitol Police who were serving on January 6th -- reaffirming the events of that day. And what we heard was heartbreaking and disturbing: _“For most people, Jan. 6 happened for a few hours. But for those of us who were in the thick of it, it has not ended.”_
_\--_
_“I was grabbed, beaten, tased, all while being called a traitor to my country. I was at risk of being stripped of and killed with my own firearm.”_
_\--_
_“Some people are trying to deny what happened. To whitewash it... Let's be clear. The rioters who tried to rob us of our democracy were propelled here by a lie.”_ **Despite all this, MAGA Republicans are STILL trying to undermine, downplay, and LIE about January 6th. They’re even planning a new MAGA protest for September 18th!**

[**Peter, the committee’s work is far too important to be undermined by far-right Republicans. That’s why I need 10,000 grassroots supporters to support the January 6th committee and tell Republicans in Congress to stop the lies and do their jobs to protect our democracy NOW. Can I count on you? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35899884/306502873/960040669?refcode=MTFC_20210916_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWNkOTJhYy00MTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gOVltNpMvnvQnlC2onGssreGkikASqgFdo24zltKZBU=&emci=e8b7d523-2017-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=1acd92ac-4117-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18839602) | [10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35899885/306502874/960040669?refcode=MTFC_20210916_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWNkOTJhYy00MTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gOVltNpMvnvQnlC2onGssreGkikASqgFdo24zltKZBU=&emci=e8b7d523-2017-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=1acd92ac-4117-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18839602)

name: Great America Update
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c334%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=HqbpUmjPRtWvKaRBF8XSvg&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66513%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ScYtvWkR1KmLjJBD6ifv2A&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66513%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ScYtvWkR1KmLjJBD6ifv2A&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66514%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qG3hJHHmenFc1nVCMfImRQ&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c334%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=HqbpUmjPRtWvKaRBF8XSvg&sysid=1)_

Donald Trump won't leave New Hampshire alone, friend. Just a few hours ago, Trump praised an extreme right-wing candidate running against Maggie for Senate. This isn't the first time Donald Trump has weighed in on New Hampshire's Senate race, and it won't be the last. **From sending his cronies to visit the Granite State to publicly commenting on this race, it's clear that Trump is fixated on flipping this seat red.** Donald Trump has already reported a _$102 million war chest_ , and news outlets are predicting he will spend millions to take back the Senate. On top of everything, two McConnell-linked super PACs have placed massive ad buys in New Hampshire with the promise of more to come. With top Republicans already spending millions, Trump's meddling could permanently tip the scales against us. name: Marisa Wood
subject: un-American (not what you think)
body:
Kevin McCarthy is trying to turn this whole pandemic into an opportunity to advance his career through partisan political games, when we really need everyone to come together to end this. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35901209/306506820/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWQ4YjMwMS00NjE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6rwzGVl5hDCM4eQDbY5OTp3m6JzRv_KIgzcWCSRLwqU=)
Friend,

The difference between how Republicans and Democrats have dealt with this pandemic has been staggering.

President Biden helped keep us healthy and safe by distributing the vaccine quicker, and he's giving Americans the faith we need to get back on our feet after a year out of work or on the frontlines of this COVID-19 pandemic.

**Republicans on the other hand, have done the exact opposite.** They've denied the facts and science on COVID-19, and they're continuing to block real relief.

Take my opponent Kevin McCarthy for example. He recently called Biden's initiative to get more people who work at large employers vaccinated "un-American." He's trying to turn this whole pandemic into an opportunity to advance his career through partisan political games, when we really need everyone to come together to end this.

**Let me tell you what's un-American:** We have the second highest per capita COVID-19 case rate in the world -- second only to Mongolia -- and getting more people vaccinated is un-American? _Good grief._

As a mother and a teacher, I'm afraid that if we don't stop the Delta variant, more and more kids will get sick. More people will have their futures put on hold due to missed school and job opportunities. And the sad fact is that more Americans will die. It may be hard to say, but it's the truth -- and it's one of the major reasons why I decided to step up and give Kevin the fight of his life right here in his backyard.

**With our end-of-quarter deadline looming, I need your help getting this message out. There are enough voters who want to see Kevin McCarthy replaced, we just need to reach them. That's why I'm asking:**

**[Will you chip in $3 toward our $15,000 mid-month goal? We came up $7,191 short yesterday and I could use your help closing the gap before 11:59 pm tonight. clean_body: Kevin McCarthy is trying to turn this whole pandemic into an opportunity to advance his career through partisan political games, when we really need everyone to come together to end this. | = Friend, The difference between how Republicans and Democrats have dealt with this pandemic has been staggering. President Biden helped keep us healthy and safe by distributing the vaccine quicker, and he's giving Americans the faith we need to get back on our feet after a year out of work or on the frontlines of this COVID-19 pandemic. Republicans on the other hand, have done the exact opposite. They've denied the facts and science on COVID-19, and they're continuing to block real relief. Take my opponent Kevin McCarthy for example. He recently called Biden's initiative to get more people who work at large employers vaccinated "un-American." He's trying to turn this whole pandemic into an opportunity to advance his career through partisan political games, when we really need everyone to come together to end this. Let me tell you what's un-American: We have the second highest per capita COVID-19 case rate in the world -- second only to Mongolia -- and getting more people vaccinated is un-American? Good grief. As a mother and a teacher, I'm afraid that if we don't stop the Delta variant, more and more kids will get sick. More people will have their futures put on hold due to missed school and job opportunities. And the sad fact is that more Americans will die. It may be hard to say, but it's the truth -- and it's one of the major reasons why I decided to step up and give Kevin the fight of his life right here in his backyard. With our end-of-quarter deadline looming, I need your help getting this message out. There are enough voters who want to see Kevin McCarthy replaced, we just need to reach them. That's why I'm asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Marisa Teacher for Congress **=** | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. Consider supporting Marisa's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: Marisa Wood for Congress, PO Box 12103, Bakersfield, CA 93389. name: Andrew Yang
subject: You’re personally invited
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
You don’t want to miss this!
#
It’s Andrew Yang.
I’m thrilled to join my friend Erica Smith for a Universal Basic Income grassroots fundraiser on Zoom this Saturday, September 18 at 2:00 PM ET — [**and I’m personally inviting you to join us. Click here to get your ticket.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14824?t=1&akid=449%2E3698%2ENq7SGx)
[****](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14825?t=2&akid=449%2E3698%2ENq7SGx)
**[Get your ticket](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14824?amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=449%2E3698%2ENq7SGx)**
Right now, families in North Carolina and across the country are facing multiple crises — income inequality, generational poverty, and an economy that makes it harder and harder for working people to put food on the table.
**It’s time for urgent change. It’s time for a guaranteed income for all.**
Erica Smith will fight to pass bold, progressive policies like a Universal Basic Income — that’s why I’m excited to be showing my support this Saturday. I hope you’ll join us!
[**This is going to be a great event — and you don’t want to miss it. Please get your ticket now to join Erica and me at her Universal Basic Income virtual grassroots fundraiser on Zoom this Saturday, September 18 at 2:00 PM ET. Tickets start at just $15!**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14824?t=4&akid=449%2E3698%2ENq7SGx)
**[Get your ticket](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14824?t=5&akid=449%2E3698%2ENq7SGx)**
See you Saturday!
Andrew Yang

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210916-449-footer&t=6&refcode2=449_3698_Nq7SGx&akid=449%2E3698%2ENq7SGx)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=7&akid=449%2E3698%2ENq7SGx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=449%2E3698%2ENq7SGx)

Friend,

In a moment I'm going to ask you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35901580/306507686/-109236511?refcode=em-91621-nopens-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWE3MTkxYS00ODE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXlv-etph-jD8m73awZGK2anl4Y9dphNbIdKo2pO4ys=)** to our grassroots campaign to flip CA-01 from red to blue, but first I want to quickly explain why your support is so important.

Take the California recall for example: LaMalfa endorsed and even campaigned for Larry Elder. It's no surprise since they've both taken a page out of Trump's book. When they don't win elections fair and square, they use fear and division to undermine confidence in our democracy.

**I'll tell you what, friend. I didn't swear an oath to our country and Constitution, deploy to Iraq twice, and serve in the Foreign Service just to come home and see the GOP destroy faith in our democracy.**

## Contagious Empathy and Democracy

I am a career human service worker running for Congress in Colorado’s District 3. It is the seat currently held by Lauren Boebert.

I would like to personally invite you to join me in a conversation with world renowned neuroscientist Marco Iacoboni, **Thursday September 30th @ 5:30 pm MST.** Dr. Iacoboni, UCLA neuroscientist, was featured in a conversation with the Dalai Lama, has been cited over 34,000 times, published over 260 scientific articles, and is the author of several books including, “Mirroring People: The New Science of How We Connect with Others”. We have the power to spread empathy and enthusiasm to change this world for the better! Please join us for this online campaign fundraiser, and conversation about generating contagious empathy in America. Kellie Rhodes

clean_body: | | | | | Folks, We’re closing in on our mid-month deadline, but we still need your help. As of 9 AM today, Steve still needs 27 grassroots donations to reach his mid-month fundraising goal. We’ll cut to the chase: after winning the last election by 4 points, Gov. Sisolak’s seat was rated one of the most vulnerable in the country , and now he’s got FOUR Republican opponents running against him. Hitting every single fundraising goal is CRUCIAL to the success of Steve’s campaign -- especially here in Battleground Nevada. | | | | | Republicans are looking to undo all of the progress Steve has fought for in Nevada -- which is why they’re already stockpiling millions of dollars to unseat Steve. This means that all of Steve’s progressive accomplishments like expanding voting access, passing a public health insurance option, and raising the minimum wage are at stake . The progress we’ve made has helped millions of Nevadans, and we’re going to need your help to win this tough fight to Keep Nevada Blue. | | | | Thanks for your help. \- Team Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. body:
We have to keep going
| |

---
| | Derek, I just left the debate stage, where I faced my Trump-endorsed opponent, Glenn Youngkin.

Let’s make this clear:

Glenn Youngkin is a far-right culture warrior who has been hiding his views from voters for this entire campaign.

Derek, I tried like hell to be your voice tonight, and I sincerely hope I made you proud.

We won tonight, but we can’t waste time celebrating. We just learned that Glenn Youngkin **outraised** us after cutting himself a check for $4.5 million — _and on the eve of early voting!_

**We can win, but to match Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump’s incredible resource advantage, we have to build the largest grassroots campaign that Virginia has ever seen. And Derek, that starts right now.**

_**[I’m asking you, right here and right now, to join me. Will you chip in any amount to my campaign to help me defeat my GOP opponent?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35902133/306511172/-2023814932?refcode=20210916.6_TM_9CZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWYxNTRkZC00OTE3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ho0VF-RzhjOv9peFTv3xQrooRN0fbynRumEfmJQ6zNM=)**_

Fellow Conservative,

_I'm not kidding!_

**These companies we're supposed to make our lives better, but they've become destructive and predatory data mining monopolies.**

name: STACEY ABRAMS ACTION ALERT (via DCCC)
subject: Your response MISSING?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you stand with Stacey, or with Mitch McConnell & Donald Trump?
| | | Mitch McConnell and his Senate Republicans may have blocked our efforts to protect voting rights, but our Senate Democrats **REFUSE** to give up the fight.

And what's more, Stacey Abrams is joining the fight and urging **immediate action** to defend voting rights:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)
**
Alongside Democratic heroes like Stacey, our Senate Democrats are fighting to:**

_🗳️ Protect the right to vote
🗳️ Ban partisan gerrymandering
🗳️ End dark money influence on our elections_

But Republicans are engaged in a concerted, nationwide effort to undermine our voting rights and **SABOTAGE** our Democrats' chances of ever winning again.

With such high stakes, we need to know where every last grassroots Democrat stands on this crucial issue.

**That 's why we're calling on 10,000 supporters to let us know: Do you stand with Stacey and our pro-voting rights Democrats, or with Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and their anti-democratic Republicans?**

[**SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Do you SUPPORT our Senate Democrats ' efforts to PROTECT voting rights and SAVE our democracy? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.)****

---
Thank you,

DCCC
---
|
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: This headline surprised us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Economic relief is just that, relief for the people.
#
Peter, not only is Senator Joe Manchin opposing $3.5 trillion of investments in working people, families, and our communities — he’s also saying some shameful things about the Child Tax Credit.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5779?refcode=em20210916-640-el&t=1&akid=640%2E420207%2ElRU3o3)
Joe Manchin wants to require people to work in order to receive the $250-$300 per child monthly relief checks for their kids. **Plain and simple, these are GOP talking points.**
We’ve seen historic levels of unemployment during the pandemic — along with increased levels of poverty and hunger in America. The Child Tax Credit has provided some much needed economic relief to families, and it has done so while cutting poverty. We fought to pass the Child Tax Credit for families with children so we can tackle the rampant economic inequality that leaves the 99 percent behind while CEOs and billionaires get richer.
[Pramila is fighting for long overdue economic relief WITHOUT cruel requirements and bureaucratic obstacles. Can you chip in to fuel her work for families across America? Contribute $3 today to support Pramila’s tireless advocacy for economic justice.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5779?refcode=em20210916-640&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=640%2E420207%2ElRU3o3)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5779?refcode=em20210916-640&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=640%2E420207%2ElRU3o3)**
The Child Tax Credit was passed as a temporary benefit, which Pramila is now fighting to make permanent. This fight is so much more difficult with these statements by Manchin AND the corporate lobbying that is trying to block us.
Economic relief is just that, relief for the people. Folks having trouble finding a job or who are unable to work may need the most help from the Child Tax Credit and other economic relief measures. We need to fight for them.
[Let’s combat conservative messaging and win more economic relief for the people. Chip in today to fuel Pramila’s fight for economic justice.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5779?refcode=em20210916-640&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=640%2E420207%2ElRU3o3)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210916-640-footer&t=23&refcode2=640_420207_lRU3o3&akid=640%2E420207%2ElRU3o3)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=640%2E420207%2ElRU3o3)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=640%2E420207%2ElRU3o3)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
subject: They called me a self-hating Latino
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d88caf50f12542f99eda9f5110432a07&_e=bvMfbNREpXPbRiU_gUId8uK2PwXHxmyl6eUHB0ilEZ38NuvjTDJKXnpTz7loMBbzBDp2rJ7hFjclu3Bac-TUDcnac8n8L6aeAr5MEvsRWxtR_QinKbm_GFA1XNXx1M1La1UuvxWiMf59EKOxAUP9iA_yVFVUtjYw-lr1YWb69qO-7V7IP16F3hI_wanRFVeSFp89T7R5-R_RNB3rCdVBSrAHcThumInBPa-lbmib0L-OuTZXD0fmacpvGoCNMCrEXg0nhrs4ZtwIZcp36DHUhVSSBGTX1i2pew3JP0mtI7bk1__TKVwky75w2zAWTlAVyBuAEoEjTMTCWPPS9B-eMdhoWC8FGWSONcVsLYTDnB33-kP08p1QcwnG1I_yv0luSoKn-o-j_KlAb4s2kIUaw5-fUoKCt-Spo5ghnfSZwJ5swJLHrkd1ealdI5-E31dYbtQI3gNYhsyppfOICfJEml0dNL9BxuxH8YMtF5axMngiD9D2xr1VrNSgjSGRmCfx)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Hispanics were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Hispanic,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, **a proud Hispanic Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d88caf50f12542f99eda9f5110432a07&_e=bvMfbNREpXPbRiU_gUId8uK2PwXHxmyl6eUHB0ilEZ38NuvjTDJKXnpTz7loMBbzBDp2rJ7hFjclu3Bac-TUDcnac8n8L6aeAr5MEvsRWxtR_QinKbm_GFA1XNXx1M1La1UuvxWiMf59EKOxAUP9iA_yVFVUtjYw-lr1YWb69qO-7V7IP16F3hI_wanRFVeSFp89T7R5-R_RNB3rCdVBSrAHcThumInBPa-lbmib0L-OuTZXD0fmacpvGoCNMCrEXg0nhrs4ZtwIZcp36DHUhVSSBGTX1i2pew3JP0mtI7Y9Uhs4xSbKG687kkmPyWXFSAbtljtWZHWXHAnCaqTfZI73fy-woKnBlUVVcJmD-44_TE1mseHdhse6xHd15XioShm8P7kUmx18DbEBMck1ARmTSw_tJLOcHaCnw-onarsGFS_dYH-d7KgIOTGuXtTdaa7DoymCc-DiIWLGz9uVOzVmQkUez8_6k25NC0n2IpVgumdSEIhnY7oFcXjhSFJN)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanic's⇒ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d88caf50f12542f99eda9f5110432a07&_e=bvMfbNREpXPbRiU_gUId8uK2PwXHxmyl6eUHB0ilEZ38NuvjTDJKXnpTz7loMBbzBDp2rJ7hFjclu3Bac-TUDcnac8n8L6aeAr5MEvsRWxtR_QinKbm_GFA1XNXx1M1La1UuvxWiMf59EKOxAUP9iA_yVFVUtjYw-lr1YWb69qO-7V7IP16F3hI_wanRFVeSFp89T7R5-R_RNB3rCdVBSrAHcThumInBPa-lbmib0L-OuTZXD0fmacpvGoCNMCrEXg0nhrs4ZtwIZcp36DHUhVSSBGTX1i2pew3JP0mtI7aosMW7L31ROFnMnjpsat4gB2JYkOdwjcIT50eNCXSB6GJNVRVza7E-ADkuwJQeeLyyXxxfy5IZVUTRbuZCdG1P-RKrg4tH9fqCpad3kj0TdIZ5ouX5znrV9rvoERnMg_p2UogQMMpNGJ5_jrow8ulXj-klK3kbNGGQxrWH5tlWINDqtrfS-PmtEe1InIS3bEvqVUnV44jyPLuT2VVkPe3E)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Hispanics?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d88caf50f12542f99eda9f5110432a07&_e=bvMfbNREpXPbRiU_gUId8uK2PwXHxmyl6eUHB0ilEZ38NuvjTDJKXnpTz7loMBbzBDp2rJ7hFjclu3Bac-TUDcnac8n8L6aeAr5MEvsRWxtR_QinKbm_GFA1XNXx1M1La1UuvxWiMf59EKOxAUP9iA_yVFVUtjYw-lr1YWb69qO-7V7IP16F3hI_wanRFVeSFp89T7R5-R_RNB3rCdVBSrAHcThumInBPa-lbmib0L-OuTZXD0fmacpvGoCNMCrEXg0nhrs4ZtwIZcp36DHUhVSSBGTX1i2pew3JP0mtI7bWIucFECKp-TkY0VoWJTTRy0InPLBvrAMsjSdHmf2QqMsyXNSpNQkQ2hjmbtUoaXnWpMWrIFUxPb92DRKq1cl8wx4OABEGUjJ0fEw6hA3FZRtwt1h8UrVdHOfuo8r_LP3sstBHDW4h7WYZbc0XrcSudJQtrjGmH2uJo43CMZ3N-zTtZ4o0KtStWrddG_EBhFrn87bSImhkXd0Eza1LZO1x)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanic's ⇒ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d88caf50f12542f99eda9f5110432a07&_e=bvMfbNREpXPbRiU_gUId8uK2PwXHxmyl6eUHB0ilEZ38NuvjTDJKXnpTz7loMBbzBDp2rJ7hFjclu3Bac-TUDcnac8n8L6aeAr5MEvsRWxtR_QinKbm_GFA1XNXx1M1La1UuvxWiMf59EKOxAUP9iA_yVFVUtjYw-lr1YWb69qO-7V7IP16F3hI_wanRFVeSFp89T7R5-R_RNB3rCdVBSrAHcThumInBPa-lbmib0L-OuTZXD0fmacpvGoCNMCrEXg0nhrs4ZtwIZcp36DHUhVSSBGTX1i2pew3JP0mtI7ZIWeixni4OvIK0sYyclL3l59TDmCmpZClO77cX85hxAfmkTJzhQW06Wi0wol7hyKv0-ECSEPOYrbeOU-bRT2isETeDUSbbXbedwtz1f4Au7LQZYq1l1YnZ8Nbe3FTaXLRyq8KiDF6fLfP67k2jU_dmWoi0p9BqPBN92Aq5X9Jy5so89HPHUeLojv3OI9tUvg4x7EPOrDLjMnTs0V1CrM91)
Culturally, Hispanics are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Hispanic communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d88caf50f12542f99eda9f5110432a07&_e=bvMfbNREpXPbRiU_gUId8uK2PwXHxmyl6eUHB0ilEZ38NuvjTDJKXnpTz7loMBbzBDp2rJ7hFjclu3Bac-TUDcnac8n8L6aeAr5MEvsRWxtR_QinKbm_GFA1XNXx1M1La1UuvxWiMf59EKOxAUP9iA_yVFVUtjYw-lr1YWb69qO-7V7IP16F3hI_wanRFVeSFp89T7R5-R_RNB3rCdVBSrAHcThumInBPa-lbmib0L-OuTZXD0fmacpvGoCNMCrEXg0nhrs4ZtwIZcp36DHUhVSSBGTX1i2pew3JP0mtI7aRphtmYJ5rLqaz7wbjoGnjKA1Key2_9EBS3o2PqzxC-eKCqYutijf9gbtpr98uRkP04s8qcm2QB37NN_7E_0PtVIQ5ynlUghQ_m1pMV9HCz0pkFmcfKSIwtTCks1VUDkZPC_qLF8Ijsku8S-tSR1pZfVXmSbxk8c4Hgs7O-sveJQBW-iyk0h7GSs9MlkmJ_P6AGQwp3-fiBAstZA7JcLEe)

clean_body: I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | Fellow patriot, Not too long ago, Hispanics were expected and assumed to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican. I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a “coconut” - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “self-hating Hispanic,” as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, a proud Hispanic Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY. Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by just 6,588 votes. I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others. As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority. In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more brown Republican women of color. Culturally, Hispanics are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Hispanic communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.” But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable. Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today. If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.” Help me prove him right. Thank you for your time. Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez Republican for Congress | Paid for by Monica for Congress Don't want to receive our emails?

Peter,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Peter. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

clean_body: Glenn wrote himself a monster check | | | = | | Derek, did you catch Terry’s debate against Glenn Youngkin tonight? Terry won because he laid out a clear vision for Virginia’s future — unlike Glenn Youngkin, who's just running to buy the Governor’s office for Donald Trump. It was a great night, but we can’t waste time celebrating. Early voting starts tomorrow, and this morning we learned that Youngkin loaned his campaign millions of dollars. He’s outraising and out-spending us at the worst possible moment. In a race this close, Youngkin’s cash advantage could be the difference between winning and losing. That’s where we come in, Derek. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being on this team, Gwen Rocco Deputy Campaign Manager Terry for VA =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. As 1 of the 5 seats we need to flip to take back the House at the midterms, our race truly will determine the future of our country -- and you can rest assured Pelosi will treat it as such. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2900 for the primary election, $2,900 for the primary run-off election, and $2,900 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

name: Alvin Williams (BAMPAC)
subject: They're coming after him...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC
body:
Peter, they're coming after him like nothing I've ever seen... -
| | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Dear Mr. Willis, The Democrats and their mainstream media comrades have unleashed an unbelievably despicable assault on Burgess Owens in a desperate plot to destroy his reputation within the Black Community... ...because this fearless Black conservative is exposing their racist lies and reclaiming Black voters from the Democrat Party like never before. [](https://www.bampac.org/endorseburgessowens?recruiter_id=55041&info=2021EA1003&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseBurgess&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1003&n=1) **I'm hoping you'll sign your personal endorsement to _reelect_ Burgess Owens to Congress _this_ _election_...** **...but first let me explain why Democrats are so terrified of Congressman Burgess Owens.** [](https://www.bampac.org/endorseburgessowens?recruiter_id=55041&info=2021EA1003&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseBurgess&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1003&n=2)Burgess is a former NFL star & Super Bowl Champion, conservative author, and frequent guest on Fox News and conservative talk radio... ...and he's one of the fastest rising Black conservatives in America because he's fearlessly standing up and fighting back against the Democrats' racist lies & radical agenda _at_ _every_ _single_ _turn_. Burgess Owens is a rock-solid conservative through-and-through, he relentlessly fights for our values, and _he's_ _not_ _afraid_ _to_ _tell_ _it_ _like_ _it_ _is_... | "The Democratic Party looks at the black race as objects... They look at us as something they can bring out every four years, use and then put aside until the next four years. Now, we're sprinting off this plantation, and I'm so excited to see it."
---
As you know, the Democrats ruthlessly slander Black conservatives like Burgess Owens, Tim Scott, and myself in order to destroy our credibility, trust-worthiness, and status within the Black Community...
...because, _unlike conservatives of any other race_ , we can speak directly to the Black Community to expose the Democrats' lies & hypocrisy.
**But they're coming after Burgess like nothing I've ever seen!**
Maybe that's because he's taken the lead on the nationwide effort to reach out to Black voters with the truth. _He's_ _made_ _it_ _his_ _mission_ _to_...
**☐** | **Expose** the Democrat-backed Marxist plot to divide-and-conquer America with racist, hateful rhetoric and propaganda
---|---
**☐** | **Reclaim** enough Black voters to cripple the Democrat Party for decades to come
**☐** | **Break the chains** of the Democrat Plantation that's enslaving Blacks in a mental prison of resentment, victimization, & dependency
"Misery is a powerful tool the left uses. They keep people miserable, hopeless, angry and racist... and that's what divides us."
---
Burgess has quickly earned a reputation for fearlessly calling out Democrats on their lies and hypocrisy, and his damning critiques of the Democrat Party are spreading like wildfire within the Black Community.
He's opening their eyes to the race-baiting LIES by unmasking the Democrats as opportunistic, self-serving politicians who've done nothing but prey on Blacks for decades with lies, empty promises, and failed policies...
**...igniting an exodus of Black voters from the Democrat Party.**
**The Democrats are Desperate to Defeat Burgess Owens...**
...because they know that without their death-grip of at least 90% of the Black vote, it'll be nearly impossible for them to win any more elections.
That's why they poured **_$12 million_** into their failed bid to stop Burgess from retaking Mia Love's former seat back from Democrats last election...
...that's why they're desperately funneling _even_ _more_ _money_ and resources into taking him down _this_ _election_...
...that's why he's at the top Nancy Pelosi's 2022 Target List...
...and that's why they've launched such a vile, racist assault on his character and reputation so early in this critical U.S. House race.
**It's painfully obvious the Democrats are terrified of Burgess Owens, and they'll stop at nothing to SHUT HIM UP!**
And that's why your signed endorsement to Burgess Owens is so important!
| "I think the world of you. I fully endorse and support your candidacy, you're a good man with a great heart." \- Sean Hannity
---|---
Once you sign your endorsement, I'll send it directly to Burgess so he'll know patriotic conservatives like you have his back as he takes the fight to the Democrats!
Along with your signed endorsement, I pray you'll also make an urgent donation of $28, $40, $75 or more to help recruit as many of your fellow conservatives to endorse & support Burgess Owens as we can get.
Or perhaps you understand how important Burgess Owens is to reclaim Black voters from the Democrat Party, and you'd like to do more to help?
Your generous donation of $250, $500, $1000 or more will help purchase the critical advertising needed to beat back the Democrats' attacks and propel Burgess Owens to victory _this_ _election_!
| "Burgess is a friend of mine who has the deepest of character and integrity. He is a man born for these times." \- Glenn Beck
---|---
**Remember, the Democrats have unleashed an all-out assault to destroy Burgess Owens because he's empowering Black voters to leave the Democrat Party once-and-for-all...**
**...and the Democrats know that without their stranglehold on Black voters, it'll be impossible for them to ever win again.**
[So please join Sean Hannity, Glenn Beck, Donald Trump, and thousands of your fellow patriots in endorsing Congressman Burgess Owens today...](https://www.bampac.org/endorseburgessowens?recruiter_id=55041&info=2021EA1003&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseBurgess&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1003&n=3)
[...and please include an urgent donation of $28, $40, $75, $250, $500, $1000 or more to help beat back the Democrats' vicious attacks and propel Burgess Owens to victory this election!](https://www.bampac.org/endorseburgessowens?recruiter_id=55041&info=2021EA1003&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseBurgess&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1003&n=4)
[Or if you can't afford that much right now, then please send $20.22, $15, or whatever you can as a symbol of your support.](https://www.bampac.org/endorseburgessowens?recruiter_id=55041&info=2021EA1003&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseBurgess&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1003&n=5)
Thank you, and God Bless.
|
Alvin Williams
President

If you're giving up on these patriots, then please [click here](https://www.bampac.org/unsubscribe?e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1003&n=6) to STOP receiving emails from Black America's PAC.
clean_body: Peter, they're coming after him like nothing I've ever seen... - | | | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Mr. Willis, The Democrats and their mainstream media comrades have unleashed an unbelievably despicable assault on Burgess Owens in a desperate plot to destroy his reputation within the Black Community... ...because this fearless Black conservative is exposing their racist lies and reclaiming Black voters from the Democrat Party like never before. I'm hoping you'll sign your personal endorsement to reelect Burgess Owens to Congress this election... ...but first let me explain why Democrats are so terrified of Congressman Burgess Owens. is a former NFL star & Super Bowl Champion, conservative author, and frequent guest on Fox News and conservative talk radio... ...and he's one of the fastest rising Black conservatives in America because he's fearlessly standing up and fighting back against the Democrats' racist lies & radical agenda at every single turn. Burgess Owens is a rock-solid conservative through-and-through, he relentlessly fights for our values, and he's not afraid to tell it like it is... | "The Democratic Party looks at the black race as objects... They look at us as something they can bring out every four years, use and then put aside until the next four years. Now, we're sprinting off this plantation, and I'm so excited to see it." As you know, the Democrats ruthlessly slander Black conservatives like Burgess Owens, Tim Scott, and myself in order to destroy our credibility, trust-worthiness, and status within the Black Community... ...because, unlike conservatives of any other race , we can speak directly to the Black Community to expose the Democrats' lies & hypocrisy. But they're coming after Burgess like nothing I've ever seen! Maybe that's because he's taken the lead on the nationwide effort to reach out to Black voters with the truth. He's made it his mission to... ☐ | Expose the Democrat-backed Marxist plot to divide-and-conquer America with racist, hateful rhetoric and propaganda ---|--- ☐ | Reclaim enough Black voters to cripple the Democrat Party for decades to come ☐ | Break the chains of the Democrat Plantation that's enslaving Blacks in a mental prison of resentment, victimization, & dependency "Misery is a powerful tool the left uses. They keep people miserable, hopeless, angry and racist... and that's what divides us." Burgess has quickly earned a reputation for fearlessly calling out Democrats on their lies and hypocrisy, and his damning critiques of the Democrat Party are spreading like wildfire within the Black Community. He's opening their eyes to the race-baiting LIES by unmasking the Democrats as opportunistic, self-serving politicians who've done nothing but prey on Blacks for decades with lies, empty promises, and failed policies... ...igniting an exodus of Black voters from the Democrat Party. The Democrats are Desperate to Defeat Burgess Owens... ...because they know that without their death-grip of at least 90% of the Black vote, it'll be nearly impossible for them to win any more elections. That's why they poured $12 million into their failed bid to stop Burgess from retaking Mia Love's former seat back from Democrats last election... ...that's why they're desperately funneling even more money and resources into taking him down this election... ...that's why he's at the top Nancy Pelosi's 2022 Target List... ...and that's why they've launched such a vile, racist assault on his character and reputation so early in this critical U.S. House race. It's painfully obvious the Democrats are terrified of Burgess Owens, and they'll stop at nothing to SHUT HIM UP! And that's why your signed endorsement to Burgess Owens is so important! | "I think the world of you. I fully endorse and support your candidacy, you're a good man with a great heart." \- Sean Hannity ---|--- Once you sign your endorsement, I'll send it directly to Burgess so he'll know patriotic conservatives like you have his back as he takes the fight to the Democrats! Along with your signed endorsement, I pray you'll also make an urgent donation of $28, $40, $75 or more to help recruit as many of your fellow conservatives to endorse & support Burgess Owens as we can get. Or perhaps you understand how important Burgess Owens is to reclaim Black voters from the Democrat Party, and you'd like to do more to help? Your generous donation of $250, $500, $1000 or more will help purchase the critical advertising needed to beat back the Democrats' attacks and propel Burgess Owens to victory this election! | "Burgess is a friend of mine who has the deepest of character and integrity. He is a man born for these times." \- Glenn Beck ---|--- Remember, the Democrats have unleashed an all-out assault to destroy Burgess Owens because he's empowering Black voters to leave the Democrat Party once-and-for-all... ...and the Democrats know that without their stranglehold on Black voters, it'll be impossible for them to ever win again. body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b08e82efce6b40179ebd85bbfab60f1c&_e=WZp5spwJP2imNYE0Ag2nIw78dRvYxN960GBL1_85uVrTQsT51oCiI26B2bzCJzu4bhEpZlzc906od1tb3B5kPRWK2ADgFpfd2GmW2dhtyuem0QApeHKechghaG6cnjVXG_1uegLA6uPfP1Y0Ca_Pv0Rjvbpt2yFCQ0ReNXsKpIawpSCajcexirYv0QvXO2uHHTOLVFCvX_fgPxkZyaIT71XHVPVuhKWZA31ap9G60zNBodQS1AGGvQE-m-0qPOB5wz5kipj3TjGthr_NjOIdU_vocMetebthnPgvXPfbIa5G9PYLjFfa4vgswBuquLDHw41aLxERJpuVaFflgDiR9UiP-BjmMUZlIutlpYaTzgZJWMJgPApWOo4SPwC8c9Jm1k3BMyMhu_CXEmGPA4QBO-GRDvn8jh8aV8Wh2jBXnrjqs7CM9f6t5NnpNOHgDAJIJT1kaBzFbVAaS6L4SKRYtQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Hi, Derek. I'm sorry for popping into your inbox like this – but I'm leaning on my strongest supporters because **Republicans are trying to PERMANENTLY keep Florida red and flip the Senate.** [****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIcGj0JYoWygF5AE4mJQMdVH2Mubo3v4-lGmk1OVx0TzeAUpYnGKRlfOoydp6z2JQJ3MkyoptAZA95GrpZMsBnAV9fBeuGB8NNroVvJyNPKdc5WQ4RR4J_2LyGVFv2aVP7ndOklGjZVLrdWofVKKr97B_XLZFQ9lm75NF3D-HLCqa-y0tBQfUpDw_m3k3RB9quUbGRQi1tdrRbA326XsUpDOR6hMsxN5wMhs8EYjMPBQW1TLhBDbTOFHI5VLGqPKoaFuE1p28Hrep1zDeTe4Skfo/3fd/_Hvl9KiZQM-LA8c8JoVRHg/h1/x_yBITMnPCRwHqwlLZjxIBNum0MB0akPVf8hNei9Aj0) I'm fighting to defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate – but I just found out that the Republican National Committee is investing at least $10 MILLION in on-the-ground organizers to keep Florida RED for decades. I can’t bear the thought.

I'll give it to you straight, Derek: GOP leaders are saying that registering 60,000 more Republican voters could hand Florida to the GOP _permanently_. I'm not giving up on Florida – but with Republicans pouring money into this race, I need to make critical investments right now. clean_body: Republicans are trying to PERMANENTLY keep Florida red and flip the Senate. | | | Hi, Derek. I'm sorry for popping into your inbox like this – but I'm leaning on my strongest supporters because Republicans are trying to PERMANENTLY keep Florida red and flip the Senate. I'm fighting to defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate – but I just found out that the Republican National Committee is investing at least $10 MILLION in on-the-ground organizers to keep Florida RED for decades. I can’t bear the thought. I'll give it to you straight, Derek: GOP leaders are saying that registering 60,000 more Republican voters could hand Florida to the GOP permanently. I'm not giving up on Florida – but with Republicans pouring money into this race, I need to make critical investments right now. And I cannot afford to make those investments if I miss my critical $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal tonight. I can't thank you enough for your support. Congresswoman Val Demings | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: Allow me to introduce myself
body:
| [ ](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0cJBE_qWiIW1RPfaGasHopg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farrow_grassroots_email_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Dear Friend -- I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to reach out and introduce myself -- my name is Paul Farrow, and I was recently elected chairman of the Republican Party of Wisconsin. I have been around the conservative movement for my entire life; I currently serve as Waukesha County Executive, I formerly served in the State Assembly and State Senate, and I am excited to take on this new role and work together to deliver decisive conservative victories this election cycle. I understand that I am taking on this position at a critical time in our party history. As a state, we are experiencing disastrous leadership from Democrats on all levels. Nationally, Joe Biden’s botched Afghanistan withdrawal has tragically cost American lives, and in Wisconsin, Tony Evers’ incompetence has resulted in a rising crime, burning cities, and absent leadership. Meanwhile, Democrats are going to do everything they can to turn Senator Ron Johnson’s U.S. Senate seat blue as they continue their attempt at a liberal takeover of our country, and they are trying to thwart and attack Republicans’ efforts to secure election integrity in Wisconsin and across the nation. We need to do everything we can to ensure that we don’t let the Democrats win. I recently wrote an op-ed in Wisconsin Right Now outlining some of my goals for the party leading up to our key elections in 2022. You can read the full op-ed **[here](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=5wg3don5l6_J12hXkf3HPcNYT6lUz2m18CPWRl8AJry_y2Haj5hCqTTfiyRyyg0OsEpFhZP2GsnciWXktJND5A&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farrow_grassroots_email_3&n=2)** , or read some excerpts below: _As the newly elected chairman of the Republican Party of Wisconsin, my goal is to empower our grassroots leaders and strengthen our party from bottom to top as we work to achieve Republican victories up and down the ballot in 2022. I look forward to hearing the perspectives of activists across the state in how we can craft a strategy that will help us achieve success in all of Wisconsin’s diverse communities, from Superior to Kenosha._ _One of our top priorities must be election integrity. Our efforts are off to a great start with the Election Reform Task Force, which has been hard at work for months reviewing the biggest threats to election integrity ahead of 2022 and making recommendations to the Wisconsin State Legislature._ _I plan to further this commitment by holding listening sessions with grassroots leaders across the state, helping to ensure that Republicans are matching Democrats’ efforts to recruit poll workers and election observers across the state, and empowering county parties to hold their local municipalities and the Wisconsin Elections Commission accountable. We should all agree that ensuring that all Wisconsinites can have confidence in the results of our elections is critical, and we must make sure that our elections are free, fair, and secure._ _We also can’t wait until November 2022 to start working to elect conservatives. Over the past year, we have seen how important our local elected officials are as liberals enforced their personal views on parents, kept our children out of the classroom, and implemented harmful critical race theory curriculum. Local government officials make crucial decisions that affect our everyday lives — and we must ensure that we are working to elect principled leaders to county boards, school boards, and county executive offices across the state._ _The state party launched its first local elections initiative in the spring of 2021 with great success, and one of my primary goals is to expand this effort to achieve local victories statewide. Taking back our local governments not only ensures that our local leaders are making decisions that truly reflect the will of the people, but it also builds the bench of qualified potential candidates for statewide and federal races down the line._ My mission as chairman is to work side-by-side with you to build a coalition that will be unbeatable in 2022. I look forward to working together as we prepare for the fight ahead. Sincerely, Paul Farrow Chairman, Republican Party of Wisconsin **[WISGOP WEBSITE](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0aT_IRAMzuWr7_ff992pahs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farrow_grassroots_email_3&n=3)**
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farrow_grassroots_email_3&n=4).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farrow_grassroots_email_3&n=5) or [Facebook](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farrow_grassroots_email_3&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farrow_grassroots_email_3&n=7), software for leaders.
